tools.name: Claude
tools.shortDesc: Anthropic's flagship AI — Claude Sonnet 4.6 leads in coding, analysis, and long-context tasks.
tools.fullDesc: Claude is a large language model developed by Anthropic with a focus on safety and usefulness. Claude 3.5 Sonnet is one of the most capable LLMs available, excelling at writing code, analyzing complex data, and generating creative content.

info.label: Models
info.value: Claude Fable 5 (most capable general release), Claude Mythos 5 (trusted-access), Claude Opus 4.8 (flagship), Claude Sonnet 5 (midsize), Claude Haiku 4.5 (budget)

info.label: Context
info.value: 1M tokens (Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Sonnet 5, Haiku 4.5)

info.label: Released
info.value: Fable 5: June 2026; Opus 4.8: May 28, 2026; Sonnet 5: June 2026

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Fable 5: $10/$50 per 1M tokens; Opus 4.8: $5/$25; Sonnet 5: $2/$10 through Aug 31 2026 ($3/$15 after); Haiku 4.5: $1/$5

features: Process documents up to 200K tokens in a single request
Write and debug high-quality code in any language
Analyze PDFs, spreadsheets, and complex documents
Strong reasoning and multi-step problem solving
Computer use: automate real desktop interactions
Projects: persistent context and custom instructions

demo.title: Go to Claude
demo.desc: Visit claude.ai and create a free account with your email.

demo.title: Start a conversation
demo.desc: Type your question or request into the chat. Claude understands natural, detailed instructions.

demo.title: Upload files
demo.desc: Attach PDFs, images, or code files and ask Claude to analyze them.

demo.title: Use Projects
demo.desc: Create a Project to save context and give Claude persistent custom instructions.

prompts.label: Analyze text
prompts.text:
Analyze the following passage and summarize: (1) the main argument, (2) key supporting points, (3) logical strengths and weaknesses:
[paste text here]

prompts.label: Write code
prompts.text: Write a Python function to [describe functionality]. Include type hints, a docstring, and unit tests.

prompts.label: Professional writing
prompts.text:
Rewrite the following in a formal, academic tone suitable for a research paper, preserving all technical terms:
[text]

pricing.note: All paid plans are billed monthly or annually (up to 20% off). API usage is billed separately per token.

changes: Claude Cowork expanded to web and mobile with remote session support
Tasks continue running in background even when devices offline
Unified Chat and Cowork interface with shared projects and artifacts

vi.shortDesc: Trợ lý AI hàng đầu của Anthropic — Claude Sonnet 4.6 vượt trội về lập trình, phân tích và xử lý văn bản dài.
vi.fullDesc: Claude là mô hình AI được Anthropic phát triển với trọng tâm vào an toàn và hiệu quả. Claude Sonnet 4.6 là mô hình mặc định cho người dùng Free và Pro, nổi bật với khả năng lập trình, viết lách và phân tích tài liệu dài.

zh.shortDesc: Anthropic 的旗舰 AI — Claude Sonnet 4.6 在编程、分析和长文本处理方面表现卓越。
zh.fullDesc: Claude 是 Anthropic 开发的 AI 模型，专注于安全性和可靠性。Claude Sonnet 4.6 是 Free 和 Pro 用户的默认模型，在编程、写作和长文档分析方面表现突出。

tools.name: ChatGPT
tools.shortDesc: The world's most popular AI chatbot — now powered by GPT-5 with 400K context and computer use.
tools.fullDesc: ChatGPT by OpenAI is the most widely used AI conversation app in the world. GPT-4o unifies text, image, and voice processing in a single model for a seamless experience.

info.label: Models
info.value: <cite index="3-5">GPT-5.5 is the top model on Plus, Pro, Business, and Enterprise as of April 23, 2026</cite>. <cite index="16-6">GPT-5.6 is rolling out from the June 30 launch window into general availability across API and ChatGPT tiers through mid-July</cite>.

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="9-1">Current 2026 ChatGPT lineup: GPT-5.3 Instant (default for all users), GPT-5.4 Thinking and Pro (paid reasoning and research-grade), and the GPT-5.5 flagship</cite>. <cite index="17-14">1.5M tokens on GPT-5.6 preview — 6× over GPT-5.5</cite>.

info.label: Released
info.value: <cite index="3-5">GPT-5.5 launched on April 23, 2026</cite>. <cite index="16-6">GPT-5.6 is rolling out from the June 30 launch window into general availability</cite>.

info.label: Pricing
info.value: <cite index="2-42">Free is $0, Go is $8/month, Plus is $20/month, and the two Pro tiers are $100 and $200/month</cite>. <cite index="10-7,10-8">ChatGPT Team is priced at $25 per user/month (billed annually) or $30 per user/month (billed monthly) and includes access to GPT-5.5</cite>.

features: GPT-4o: unified text, image, and voice processing
DALL-E 3 built-in: generate images from descriptions
Real-time web browsing via Bing Search
Advanced Data Analysis: run Python, analyze data
GPTs: build and share custom AI assistants
Voice Mode: have natural spoken conversations

demo.title: Sign up for ChatGPT
demo.desc: Go to chatgpt.com and create a free account with your email.

demo.title: Select a model
demo.desc: In the top bar, choose GPT-4o (requires Plus) or use GPT-3.5 for free.

demo.title: Use attachments
demo.desc: Click the paperclip icon to upload images or files. Use the microphone for Voice Mode.

demo.title: Create a custom GPT
demo.desc: Go to "Explore GPTs" → "Create" to build a personalized assistant for your workflow.

prompts.label: Data analysis
prompts.text: I've attached a CSV file. Analyze the data, generate relevant charts, and surface the 5 most important insights.

prompts.label: Generate image
prompts.text: Create a photorealistic image of: [describe scene, lighting, camera angle, and style in detail]

prompts.label: Research
prompts.text: Search the web and summarize the latest news about [topic] from the last 7 days. Include sources.

pricing.note: ChatGPT Free provides access to GPT-4o mini with usage limits. Plus and Pro unlock higher-end models and increased rate limits.

vi.shortDesc: Chatbot AI phổ biến nhất thế giới — giờ được hỗ trợ bởi GPT-5 với 400K context và khả năng dùng máy tính.
vi.fullDesc: ChatGPT của OpenAI là công cụ AI được dùng nhiều nhất toàn cầu. GPT-5 mang đến cửa sổ ngữ cảnh 400K token, đầu vào đa phương thức và khả năng điều khiển máy tính lần đầu tiên.

zh.shortDesc: 全球最受欢迎的AI聊天机器人 — 现由GPT-5驱动，支持400K上下文和计算机使用。

tools.name: Gemini
tools.shortDesc: Google's multimodal AI — Gemini 3.1 Pro with 1M context, native video/audio, and Google Search built in.
tools.fullDesc: Gemini 1.5 Pro by Google boasts a massive 1 million token context window — enough to process an entire codebase or novel in one go. It integrates deeply with the Google ecosystem including Gmail, Drive, and Docs.

demo.title: Open Gemini
demo.desc: Visit gemini.google.com and sign in with your Google account.

demo.title: Upload large files
demo.desc: Drag and drop PDFs, videos, or audio. Gemini can handle very large files.

demo.desc: Build specialized Gems like "Email assistant" or "Document analyzer" for repeated tasks.

prompts.label: Analyze a video
prompts.text: Watch this video and provide: (1) a summary, (2) key points with timestamps, (3) a final conclusion.

prompts.label: Search Drive
prompts.text: Search my Google Drive for documents about [topic] from the last 3 months and summarize the key points.

prompts.label: Summarize emails
prompts.text: Check my Gmail inbox and summarize unread emails from today. Group by priority: urgent, important, can wait.

vi.shortDesc: AI đa phương thức của Google — Gemini 3.1 Pro với 1M token context, tích hợp Google Search và xử lý video/audio.

zh.shortDesc: Google 的多模态 AI — Gemini 3.1 Pro 拥有 1M token 上下文，集成 Google 搜索和视频/音频处理。

tools.name: DeepSeek

tools.fullDesc: DeepSeek V3 and DeepSeek-R1 caused a sensation by matching GPT-4 performance while being completely free and open-source. Particularly strong at math, code, and logical reasoning.

tools.name: GitHub Copilot
tools.shortDesc: The original AI pair programmer — deeply integrated with VS Code and GitHub.
tools.fullDesc: GitHub Copilot is the pioneering AI coding assistant, tightly woven into the GitHub ecosystem. Copilot X adds chat, automatic PR summaries, and AI-powered code review.

info.label: Models
info.value: <cite index="4-1">Pro $10 (includes $15 in credits), Pro+ $39 (includes $70), Max $100 (includes $200)</cite>. <cite index="18-11">Kimi K2.7 Code, an open-weight model, is now generally available in GitHub Copilot.</cite> <cite index="18-12,18-13">Copilot vision is now generally available. You can attach images and PDFs directly to your chat prompts so Copilot can reason about what it sees alongside your code.</cite>

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="16-11">Work with compatible Anthropic and OpenAI models using much larger context windows for bigger codebases and longer conversations.</cite> <cite index="19-3">Copilot usage is now billed through GitHub AI Credits where 1 credit equals $0.01.</cite>

info.label: Released

info.label: Pricing

Every interaction with a premium model now draws down a pool of monthly credits, and once that pool runs dry, developers pay US$0.04 for each additional premium request or get cut off until the next cycle.</cite>

tools.name: Perplexity
tools.shortDesc: The most trustworthy AI search engine — every answer comes with cited sources.
tools.fullDesc: Perplexity AI combines the power of LLMs with real-time web search, delivering accurate answers with clearly cited sources. It's the go-to tool for research and fact-finding.

info.label: Index
info.value: Real-time web

info.label: Pricing

features: Real-time search results with numbered citations
Focus modes: Academic, YouTube, Reddit, and more
File upload: analyze documents alongside web search

prompts.text: What are the latest peer-reviewed studies on [topic] from 2024? Summarize key findings and the current scientific consensus.

prompts.label: Current events
prompts.text: What happened with [event/topic] this week? Give me a comprehensive overview with sources.

pricing.note: Pro Search queries use advanced models and more sources. The API uses Sonar models optimized for search-augmented generation.

vi.shortDesc: Công cụ tìm kiếm AI — câu trả lời tức thì có nguồn trích dẫn, thay thế tìm kiếm truyền thống.
vi.fullDesc: Perplexity là công cụ tìm kiếm thế hệ mới kết hợp AI với tìm kiếm web thời gian thực. Thay vì danh sách link, bạn nhận được câu trả lời tổng hợp có nguồn trích dẫn rõ ràng.

zh.shortDesc: AI 搜索引擎 — 带引用来源的即时答案，替代传统搜索。
zh.fullDesc: Perplexity 是新一代搜索引擎，将 AI 与实时网络搜索相结合。与其返回链接列表，它提供带有明确引用来源的综合答案。

tools.name: Devin
tools.shortDesc: The first autonomous AI software engineer that can work end-to-end independently.
tools.fullDesc: Devin is the first AI agent capable of acting as a real software engineer — writing code, running tests, fixing bugs, deploying apps, and navigating complex codebases entirely on its own.

info.label: Models
info.value: Devin operates as compound AI system with specialized models (Planner, Coder, Critic, Browser). Latest version: Devin Desktop v3.4.27 (as of July 7, 2026), Devin 2.0+ with Claude Sonnet 5 and additional LLM options available

info.label: Context
info.value: Devin is an autonomous AI software engineer by Cognition AI. Launched March 2024. In 2026 it operates in cloud-hosted SaaS, Enterprise VPC deployment, and CLI tool modes with sandbox execution, autonomous pull request generation, code review capabilities (Devin Review), and integration with GitHub/GitLab

info.label: Released
info.value: March 2024 (initial v1). Devin 2.0 released April 2025 with major pricing restructure. Devin 2.2 released February 24, 2026. Multiple updates through June-July 2026 including Claude Sonnet 5 integration, security features, and UI improvements

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Core: $20/month + $2.25 per ACU (pay-as-you-go). Pro: $20/month. Max: $200/month. Teams: $80/month base + $40/month per developer seat. Enterprise: custom pricing. ACU = ~15 minutes of active work. Team plan includes 250 ACUs/month

features: Runs and fixes failing tests automatically
Interacts with terminal, browser, and IDE
Works alongside human developers in parallel
Learns from feedback during the session

demo.title: Access Devin
demo.desc: Go to app.devin.ai and sign up or join the waitlist for Enterprise access.

demo.title: Assign a task
demo.desc: Describe the task as you would to a human engineer: "Build a REST API for user authentication with JWT".

demo.title: Monitor progress
demo.desc: Devin reports its own progress. You can comment and provide guidance at any point.

demo.title: Review and merge
demo.desc: Devin opens a pull request on GitHub. Review it and merge as you would with any developer.

prompts.label: Assign task
prompts.text:
Build a full-stack todo app with:
- React frontend with TypeScript
- Node.js + Express backend
- PostgreSQL database
- JWT authentication
- Deploy to Vercel + Railway

Follow best practices, write tests, document the API.

pricing.note: Devin is priced per ACU (Agent Compute Unit) — a measure of the compute used per task. The Teams plan includes shared history and oversight features.

vi.shortDesc: Kỹ sư phần mềm AI tự động đầu tiên — làm việc độc lập trong terminal và browser.
vi.fullDesc: Devin là AI agent tự động đầu tiên có thể hoàn thành các dự án phần mềm end-to-end. Nó tự lập kế hoạch, viết code, debug và deploy — giống một junior developer thực sự.

zh.shortDesc: 首个自主AI软件工程师 — 在终端和浏览器中独立工作。
zh.fullDesc: Devin是第一个能够端到端完成软件项目的自主AI代理。它自主规划、编写代码、调试和部署——就像一个真正的初级开发者。

prompts.label: Web app
prompts.text:
Build a full-stack expense tracker:
- React + Tailwind frontend
- Node.js + Express backend
- SQLite database
- Add/view/delete expenses
- Monthly summary chart using Recharts

prompts.label: API server
prompts.text: Create a REST API for a blog with: GET /posts, POST /posts, GET /posts/:id, DELETE /posts/:id. Use Express, store data in-memory, add input validation.

pricing.note: Replit Agent uses "checkpoints" per major build action. Free plan includes limited agent usage. Core is best value for regular builders.

vi.shortDesc: Xây dựng và deploy app đầy đủ từ một prompt — hoàn toàn trên trình duyệt.

zh.shortDesc: 通过提示词构建并部署完整应用 — 完全在浏览器中完成。
zh.fullDesc: Replit Agent让您描述想要构建的应用，AI自动创建、运行并部署。无需本地安装，一切都在云端。

tools.name: OpenAI Codex
tools.shortDesc: Terminal-native coding agent that reads your codebase and executes tasks autonomously.
tools.fullDesc: OpenAI Codex CLI is a lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal. It reads your local files, understands the full codebase, and writes code, runs commands, and fixes bugs — all sandboxed safely on your machine.

info.label: Models
info.value: <cite index="17-12,17-13,17-14,17-15">GPT-5.5 (newest frontier model for complex coding), GPT-5.4 (flagship model for professional work), GPT-5.4-mini (fast, efficient mini model), and GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark (research preview available to Pro users)</cite>

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="9-3">400K token context window</cite>

info.label: Released
info.value: <cite index="3-9">May 2025</cite> (current cloud-based agent; <cite index="13-8,13-9">original Codex API deprecated March 2023</cite>)

info.label: Pricing
info.value: <cite index="16-5">Plans: Free, Go, Plus ($20/month), Pro 5x ($100/month), Pro 20x, and Business; Enterprise on custom credit pool</cite>. <cite index="1-11,1-12,1-13">Changed from message-based to token-based credit pricing in 2026, tied to input tokens, cached input tokens, and output tokens</cite>. <cite index="2-19">Typical cost ~$100-$200/developer/month</cite>

features: Runs in your terminal — no IDE required
Full codebase context: reads all local files
Executes shell commands in a sandboxed environment
Three approval modes: suggest / auto-edit / full-auto
Works with any language and framework
Network disabled by default for security

demo.title: Install Codex CLI
demo.desc: Install via npm globally.
demo.code:
npm install -g @openai/codex
codex --version

demo.title: Set your API key
demo.desc: Export your OpenAI API key as an environment variable.
demo.code: export OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...

demo.title: Run in your project
demo.desc: Navigate to any project folder and describe what you want done.
demo.code:
cd my-project
codex "add input validation to all API routes and write tests"

demo.title: Use full-auto mode
demo.desc: For trusted tasks, run with --approval=auto for zero-interruption execution.
demo.code: codex --approval=auto "refactor the auth module to use JWT"

prompts.label: Refactor
prompts.text: Refactor the entire /src/api directory to use async/await instead of callbacks. Update all tests to match the new signatures.

prompts.label: Add feature
prompts.text: Add rate limiting to all POST endpoints using express-rate-limit. 100 requests per 15 minutes per IP. Add unit tests.

pricing.note: Codex CLI is free and open-source. You pay only for the OpenAI API tokens it consumes — no flat monthly fee.

vi.shortDesc: Agent lập trình trong terminal — đọc codebase và thực thi tác vụ phức tạp tự động.
vi.fullDesc: OpenAI Codex là agent lập trình native trong terminal, có thể đọc toàn bộ codebase và thực thi các tác vụ phức tạp như refactor, debug và viết test tự động.

zh.shortDesc: 终端原生编程代理 — 读取代码库并自动执行复杂任务。
zh.fullDesc: OpenAI Codex是终端原生编程代理，能读取整个代码库并自动执行重构、调试和编写测试等复杂任务。

tools.name: Bolt.new
tools.shortDesc: Prompt-to-fullstack app in the browser — instant preview, zero setup.
tools.fullDesc: Bolt.new by StackBlitz lets you build complete web apps from a prompt in the browser using WebContainers — a full Node.js runtime running entirely in your tab. No servers, no local installs, deploy to Netlify in one click.

info.label: Models
info.value: <cite index="5-12,5-13">Sonnet 4.6 is now the default model in Bolt, with Haiku 4.5 for quick edits and Opus 4.6 for complex reasoning tasks</cite>

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="14-5,14-6">Bolt now offers two agents, Standard and Max, instead of individual model options: Standard is balanced for everyday building, and Max provides deeper reasoning for complex tasks</cite>

info.label: Released
info.value: Standard and Max agents replaced individual model selection (prior to June 2026)

info.label: Pricing
info.value: <cite index="8-1,8-2">Free plan with 1M tokens/month, Pro plan at $25/month with 10M tokens, and Teams plan at $30/member/month. All paid plans include token rollover, custom domains, and no Bolt branding</cite>

features: Full Node.js runtime running entirely in the browser
Supports React, Vue, Svelte, Next.js, Astro, and more
Live preview side-by-side as the AI builds
One-click deploy to Netlify with a live URL
Powered by Claude 3.5 Sonnet for best output quality

demo.title: Open bolt.new
demo.desc: Go to bolt.new — no sign-in needed to start. Just type your prompt.

demo.title: Describe your app
demo.desc: Be specific about the stack and features you want.
demo.code: Build a personal finance dashboard with React and Recharts. Show monthly income vs expenses as a bar chart and a category breakdown as a pie chart. Use mock data.

demo.title: Edit and iterate
demo.desc: Type follow-up prompts or edit code directly in the editor. Preview updates live.

demo.title: Deploy
demo.desc: Click "Deploy to Netlify" for a live public URL in under one minute.

prompts.label: Landing page
prompts.text: Build a SaaS landing page with React + Tailwind. Include: hero with CTA, features grid (6 items), pricing table (3 tiers), and footer. Dark purple theme.

prompts.label: Admin dashboard
prompts.text: Create an admin dashboard with React. Include: sidebar nav, 4 KPI stat cards, a data table with pagination, and a line chart using Recharts. Tailwind CSS.

pricing.note: Bolt uses an AI token system. Free tier resets daily. Paid plans give large monthly token budgets. Tokens are only consumed by AI generation — editing code manually is free.

vi.shortDesc: Từ prompt đến fullstack app trong trình duyệt — preview ngay, không cần cài đặt.
vi.fullDesc: Bolt.new cho phép bạn build ứng dụng fullstack hoàn chỉnh chỉ bằng mô tả văn bản, ngay trong trình duyệt. Preview realtime, deploy một click, hỗ trợ nhiều framework.

zh.shortDesc: 在浏览器中从提示词到全栈应用 — 即时预览，无需安装。
zh.fullDesc: Bolt.new让您只需文字描述就能在浏览器中构建完整全栈应用。实时预览，一键部署，支持多种框架。

tools.name: v0

Copy-paste code directly into any Next.js project

tools.name: Windsurf
tools.shortDesc: Agentic IDE where AI tracks your every move and works alongside you in real-time.
tools.fullDesc: Windsurf (by Codeium) is an AI-first IDE built around "Cascade" — an agentic AI that maintains full awareness of your edits, terminal, and codebase in real-time. It can autonomously make multi-file changes while you stay in the flow.

info.label: Models
info.value: <cite index="1-6,1-15">SWE-1.6 (third generation proprietary model, shipped April 7, 2026)</cite>

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="1-17">950 tok/s on fast tier, 13x faster than Claude Sonnet 4.5</cite>

info.label: Released
info.value: <cite index="1-40,1-41">Windsurf 2.0 shipped April 15, 2026 with Agent Command Center, Devin cloud agents, and Spaces</cite>

info.label: Pricing
info.value: <cite index="1-3,1-10">Free: $0; Pro: $20/mo (quota-based)</cite>; <cite index="6-5">Max: $200/mo; Teams: $40/seat/mo</cite>

features: Cascade: agentic AI with real-time dev context awareness
Tracks your edits, terminal output, and errors live
Multi-file changes with full project understanding
Supercomplete: fills in entire logic blocks as you type
Inline diff view: review every AI change before accepting
Cheaper than Cursor for similar capabilities

demo.title: Download Windsurf
demo.desc: Get the editor at codeium.com/windsurf — installs just like VS Code.

demo.title: Open Cascade (Cmd+L)
demo.desc: Start a Cascade session and describe what you want built or fixed.

demo.title: Cascade self-corrects
demo.desc: As Cascade edits files, it watches your terminal for errors and fixes them automatically.

demo.title: Review inline diffs
demo.desc: Every change appears as an inline diff. Accept all changes or pick them individually.

prompts.label: Full feature
prompts.text: Implement user authentication: signup, login, logout. Use JWT tokens, bcrypt for passwords, store users in SQLite. Add middleware to protect private routes. Write tests.

prompts.label: Debug
prompts.text: The tests in /tests/api.test.js are failing. Read the error output, trace to the root cause, and fix it without changing the test assertions.

pricing.note: Windsurf uses "credits" for Cascade agentic actions. Free plan is very generous for solo devs. Pro is ~25% cheaper than Cursor for comparable features.

vi.shortDesc: IDE có AI theo dõi từng thao tác và làm việc cùng bạn như đồng nghiệp thực sự.
vi.fullDesc: Windsurf là IDE agentic nơi AI hiểu toàn bộ ngữ cảnh dự án và chủ động đề xuất, viết code, refactor — không chỉ autocomplete mà còn hành động độc lập.

zh.shortDesc: AI追踪每个操作并与您像真正同事一样协作的IDE。

tools.name: Manus
tools.shortDesc: General-purpose autonomous agent — browses, codes, researches, and executes complex tasks.
tools.fullDesc: Manus is a fully autonomous AI agent that can browse the web, write and run code, manage files, fill out forms, and complete complex multi-step tasks with minimal human input. One of the first truly general-purpose agents available to the public.

info.label: Models
info.value: Manus 1.6 Lite, 1.6, 1.6 Max

info.label: Context
info.value: Autonomous AI agent for research, web automation, code execution, and task delegation

info.label: Released
info.value: March 2025 (launched); 1.6 December 2025

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free ($0/mo, 300 daily credits), Pro ($20-$40/mo, 4,000-8,000 monthly credits), Team ($20/seat/mo)

features: Browses the web autonomously to research any topic
Writes, runs, and debugs code in a sandbox
Manages files: create, read, edit, and organize
Fills out forms and interacts with any website
Compiles full research reports with cited sources
Long-horizon tasks: works unattended for minutes to hours

demo.title: Request access
demo.desc: Go to manus.im and join the waitlist — currently invite-based.

demo.title: Give it a complex task
demo.desc: Describe a multi-step goal in plain English. Manus plans and executes autonomously.

demo.title: Watch the agent work
demo.desc: Observe in real-time: browser tabs opening, code running, files being created.

demo.title: Receive the output
demo.desc: Manus delivers a complete result: a finished report, a file, or a working prototype.

prompts.label: Market research
prompts.text: Research the top 10 AI coding tools in 2025. For each: company, pricing, key features, and GitHub stars if open-source. Output a comparison table and a 500-word trend summary.

tools.name: OpenClaw
tools.shortDesc: Your own 24/7 AI agent living on your machine — chat via WhatsApp, Telegram, or Discord.
tools.fullDesc: OpenClaw is an open-source personal AI assistant that runs on your own computer (Mac, Windows, Linux) and connects to any chat app you already use — WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, iMessage, Slack. It has persistent memory, full system access, browser control, and a growing library of community-built skills. Your data never leaves your machine.

info.label: Models
info.value: <cite index="8-55">OpenClaw integrates with external large language models such as Claude, DeepSeek, or OpenAI's GPT models</cite>. <cite index="3-11">The top model on the dashboard was GPT-5.5</cite>, though <cite index="10-1">recent updates now support OpenAI GPT-5.6</cite>

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="8-1">OpenClaw is a free and open-source autonomous artificial intelligence agent that can execute tasks via large language models (LLMs), using messaging platforms as its main user interface</cite>. <cite index="7-6,7-7">The codebase is open source under an MIT license and can be downloaded and run locally with no licensing fees</cite>. <cite index="7-32,7-33,7-34">MyClaw is the managed hosting platform built for OpenClaw, with plans running from $29/month (Lite: 2 vCPU, 4GB RAM, 40GB SSD) up to $239/month (Ultra: 16 vCPU, 32GB RAM, 320GB SSD)</cite>

info.label: Released
info.value: <cite index="8-2">OpenClaw was first published in November 2025</cite>

info.label: Pricing
info.value: <cite index="2-1">OpenAI opened ChatGPT subscriptions to OpenClaw's 3.2 million users, allowing them to run autonomous agents through the Codex endpoint for $23 per month</cite>. <cite index="9-13">OpenClaw is flat available under ChatGPT paid plans</cite>

features: Runs 24/7 on your own Mac, Windows, or Linux machine
Chat via WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, iMessage, Slack, Signal
Persistent memory — remembers you across all conversations
Full system access: read/write files, run shell commands, execute scripts
Browser control: browse the web, fill forms, extract data autonomously
Skills & plugins: 50+ integrations, community ClawHub, or build your own
Proactive heartbeats: checks in with you, sends reminders, runs cron tasks
Bring your own model: Anthropic, OpenAI, or local models

demo.title: Install OpenClaw
demo.desc: One command installs everything including Node.js.
demo.code: curl -fsSL https://openclaw.ai/install.sh | bash

demo.title: Onboard your lobster
demo.desc: Run the onboard wizard to name your agent and connect your first chat app.
demo.code: openclaw onboard

demo.title: Connect WhatsApp or Telegram
demo.desc: Follow the prompts to link your messaging app. OpenClaw will appear as a contact you can message.

demo.title: Start chatting
demo.desc: Send it tasks just like a coworker. It will browse, code, manage files, and check in proactively.
demo.code: Hey, check my calendar for tomorrow and draft a summary of what I need to prepare.

demo.title: Install skills from ClawHub
demo.desc: Browse clawhub.ai for community skills — Gmail, GitHub, Spotify, Obsidian, and 50+ more.
demo.code:
openclaw skill install gmail
openclaw skill install github

prompts.label: Morning briefing
prompts.text: Every morning at 8am, send me: (1) weather today, (2) my calendar events, (3) top 3 news headlines in tech, (4) any unread important emails. Keep it short.

prompts.label: Autonomous task
prompts.text: Go to my GitHub, find any open PRs that have been waiting more than 3 days with no review, and send me a summary with links.

prompts.label: Build a skill
prompts.text: Build me a skill that checks my Todoist every morning and sends me my top 3 priority tasks for the day via Telegram.

pricing.note: OpenClaw itself is completely free and open source. You only pay for the AI model API you connect — typically Claude or GPT-4o. The companion macOS app is also free.

plans.name: Claude API (recommended)
features: Claude Max subscription ($100/mo) or API credits
Claude 3.5 Sonnet is the recommended model
Many users route through Claude Max sub
Also works with GPT-4o, Gemini, or local models

plans.name: Local models
features: Run with Ollama or LM Studio locally
Full privacy — no external API calls

vi.shortDesc: AI agent cá nhân chạy 24/7 trên máy của bạn — chat qua WhatsApp, Telegram hoặc Discord.
vi.fullDesc: OpenClaw là trợ lý AI mã nguồn mở chạy trên máy tính của bạn và kết nối với app chat bạn đang dùng. Có bộ nhớ lâu dài, quyền truy cập hệ thống đầy đủ và thư viện skill ngày càng phong phú.

zh.shortDesc: 在您的机器上24/7运行的个人AI代理 — 通过WhatsApp、Telegram或Discord聊天。
zh.fullDesc: OpenClaw是运行在您电脑上并连接您常用聊天应用的开源AI助手，具有持久记忆、完整系统访问权限和不断增长的技能库。

changes: <cite index="10-8">OpenAI GPT-5.6 support: OpenClaw now recognizes the GPT-5.6 model family across catalog, capability, and runtime selection paths</cite>

<cite index="10-10">External harness attachment: openclaw attach launches an external harness against an existing Gateway session, making interactive Codex-style workflows easier to resume and inspect</cite>
<cite index="10-17">Telegram Codex workflows: Telegram can now start Codex pairing with /login, steer active Codex runs, and recover final replies across transient API failures</cite>
Stronger security boundaries: group prompt text separated from system prompt, unsafe command wrappers blocked
Gateway performance: startup caches channel catalogs and plugin metadata for faster hot paths
Android Talk Mode with realtime voice sessions and streaming mic input
defineToolPlugin API for typed tool plugins with generated manifest metadata
Meeting notes plugin with transcript imports and CLI access

<cite index="21-21,21-22">Leaner installs: WhatsApp, Slack, Amazon Bedrock, Anthropic Vertex, and related provider/plugin dependency cones moved out of the core runtime. Telegram got much more resilient: isolated polling, durable local spooling, safer group-media handling, and preserved HTML/Markdown formatting in streamed and scheduled replies</cite>
<cite index="21-26">Anthropic: reseed Claude CLI fresh-session retries from bounded OpenClaw transcript history after session rotation, preventing conversation amnesia</cite>
<cite index="21-29,21-31">Require explicit browser device pairing and Control UI pairing before proxy-scoped access</cite>
Release/plugin publishing: retry transient ClawHub CLI dependency install failures
Keep preview-passing plugins publishable when one preview cell flakes
Verify every expected ClawHub package version after publish for faster maintenance releases
OpenAI: support openai/chat-latest as explicit direct API-key model override
Cron CLI: include computed status in cron list and cron show JSON output

<cite index="5-20">Voice replies get a full TTS upgrade with /tts latest, chat-scoped auto-TTS controls, personas, per-agent/per-account overrides, and new Azure Speech, Xiaomi, Local CLI, Inworld, Volcengine, and ElevenLabs v3 provider coverage</cite>

<cite index="5-6">Plugin startup and install paths move to the cold persisted registry, cutting broad manifest scans while making plugin update, repair, provider discovery, and install metadata more deterministic</cite>
<cite index="5-29">Browser automation improvements including safe tab URLs in agent responses plus CDP-native role snapshot fallback with iframe-aware refs</cite>
Chat-native /tasks board for background task management
Bundled SearXNG provider plugin for web_search
Amazon Bedrock Guardrails support
macOS Voice Wake for Talk Mode trigger
Multiple gateway, webchat, and reliability fixes
Android chat settings redesign with grouped device/media sections
iOS onboarding improvements with first-run welcome pager
Official Chrome DevTools attach mode for signed-in browser sessions
Dashboard/chat UI stability fixes for tool-heavy runs
Windows gateway install hardening and fallback handling
Docker timezone override support (OPENCLAW_TZ)
Ollama reasoning visibility improvements
Android onboarding QR scan switched to Google Code Scanner

tools.error: OpenClaw is not a model service with 'Models' or 'Context' specifications. It is a free and open-source AI agent framework, not a proprietary model product. The query parameters do not match the actual product offering.

tools.name: Grok
tools.shortDesc: xAI's real-time AI with 2M token context — trained on X data with up-to-the-minute world knowledge.
tools.fullDesc: Grok by xAI integrates directly with X (Twitter), giving it real-time access to trending topics and breaking news. Grok 3 features "DeepSearch" for thorough web research and a Think mode for extended reasoning. Known for being less restrictive on controversial topics.

info.label: Models
info.value: Grok 4.5 (latest, announced July 8 2026), Grok 4.3 (April 30), Grok 4.20, Grok 4.1 Fast, Grok Build 0.1, Grok Imagine (image/video generation)

info.label: Context
info.value: Grok 4.5: 1.5T parameters, optimized for coding and agentic tasks. Grok 4.3: 1M token context. Grok 4.1 Fast: 2M token context (largest in industry)

info.label: Released
info.value: Grok 4.5 announced July 8, 2026 (public availability July 9, 2026). Grok 4.3 released April 30, 2026. Grok 4.1 Fast previously available.

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Grok 4.5 pricing: TBD (not yet announced). Grok 4.3: $1.25/$2.50 per 1M input/output tokens. Grok 4.1 Fast: $0.20/$0.50. API: pay-per-token. Consumer: Free tier, SuperGrok Lite $10/mo, SuperGrok $30/mo, X Premium+ $40/mo, SuperGrok Heavy $300/mo.

features: Real-time access to X/Twitter posts and trends
DeepSearch: multi-step web research with citations
Think mode: extended reasoning for hard problems
Grok Studio: code execution and artifact preview
Integrated with X app on mobile
Less filtered — fewer refusals on edge topics

tools.name: Llama (Meta AI)
tools.shortDesc: Meta's open-source LLM — Llama 4 Scout has the world's largest context window at 10M tokens.
tools.fullDesc: Llama 4 by Meta is the most capable open-source LLM family, with models from 8B to 405B+ parameters. Because weights are freely downloadable, you can run Llama on your own hardware, fine-tune it on custom data, or deploy it in private infrastructure with zero data leaving your control.

info.label: Models
info.value: <cite index="13-37,13-38">Llama 4 Scout (17 billion active parameter model with 16 experts, 109B total parameters) and Llama 4 Maverick (17 billion active parameter model with 128 experts, 400B total parameters)</cite>

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="3-7">Llama 4 Scout: 10,000,000 tokens</cite>; <cite index="13-38">Llama 4 Maverick: 1M context window</cite>

info.label: Released
info.value: <cite index="6-3">April 2025</cite>

info.label: Pricing
info.value: <cite index="3-7">Scout: $0.08 per 1M input tokens and $0.30 per 1M output tokens</cite>; <cite index="1-18">Maverick: $0.50 per million input tokens</cite> (AWS Bedrock pricing varies by provider)

features: Completely free model weights for download
Fine-tune on your own data — no vendor lock-in
Run fully locally: Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp
Available via hosted APIs: Groq, Together AI, Perplexity
Meta AI assistant: free chatbot at meta.ai

demo.title: Try Meta AI
demo.desc: Chat at meta.ai for free — no account needed. Llama 4 Maverick powers it.

demo.title: Run locally with Ollama
demo.desc: Install Ollama and pull the model in one command.
demo.code:
curl https://ollama.ai/install.sh | sh
ollama pull llama4:scout
ollama run llama4:scout

demo.title: Use hosted API (Groq)
demo.desc: Sign up at console.groq.com for free API access — Llama runs at blazing speed on Groq hardware.
demo.code:
curl -X POST https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $GROQ_API_KEY"
  -d '{"model":"llama-4-scout","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Hello"}]}'

demo.title: Fine-tune
demo.desc: Use Unsloth or Axolotl to fine-tune Llama on your own dataset — runs on a single RTX 3090.

tools.name: Mistral AI
tools.shortDesc: European open-weight AI — DevStral leads SWE-bench for coding, beating GPT-4.1 at 1/4 the price.
tools.fullDesc: Mistral AI is a Paris-based AI lab producing some of the most efficient LLMs available. Mistral Medium 3.1 delivers performance close to GPT-4o at $0.40/1M tokens — 8x cheaper. Their open-weight models (Mistral 7B, Mixtral 8x7B) are widely used for local deployment.

info.label: Models

For coding: Mistral Medium 3.5</cite>.

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="2-22,2-23">Mistral Large 2 supports a 128K token context window. Mistral Small 3 also ships with 128K context</cite>.

info.label: Released

prompts.text: I need to process 10 million short customer messages per month through an LLM. Compare the monthly cost of Mistral Medium 3.1 vs GPT-4o for this use case.

tools.name: Microsoft Copilot
tools.shortDesc: AI assistant embedded in Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Teams, and Outlook — powered by GPT-4o.
tools.fullDesc: Microsoft Copilot is the AI layer baked into Microsoft 365 and Windows. It can draft emails in Outlook, summarize meetings in Teams, write formulas in Excel (now with Python), create presentations in PowerPoint, and help you build automations in Power Platform.

info.label: Models
info.value: GPT-5.2 (Quick Response and Think Deeper modes); Claude (Anthropic) available in Copilot Chat

info.label: Context
info.value: Free tier; Microsoft 365 Premium ($19.99/month); Microsoft 365 Copilot Business ($18/month promotional through Sept 30, 2026, standard $21/month); Enterprise add-on ($30/month); Microsoft 365 E7 ($99/month)

info.label: Released
info.value: Copilot Pro retired late 2025; Microsoft 365 Premium launched October 2025; Copilot Business permanent bundles effective July 1, 2026

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free (basic chat); Microsoft 365 Premium ~$19.99/month (consumer bundle with Office apps); Business $18/month promotional or $21/month standard (SMB, requires M365 base plan); Enterprise $30/month (requires qualifying M365 plan); Bundled plans: Business Standard with Copilot $23.50/month, Business Premium with Copilot $32/month

features: Draft and rewrite emails directly in Outlook
Summarize Teams meetings with action items
Excel: Python integration for advanced data analysis
PowerPoint: generate decks from a brief description
Word: rewrite, summarize, and format documents
Copilot Studio: build custom AI agents for your company

demo.title: Access Copilot
demo.desc: Go to copilot.microsoft.com — free tier available with Microsoft account.

demo.title: In Microsoft 365
demo.desc: With M365 Copilot license, look for the Copilot icon in any Office app (Word, Excel, Outlook, Teams).

demo.title: Summarize a meeting
demo.desc: After a Teams meeting, click "Copilot" in the recap tab. It auto-generates a summary and action items.

demo.title: Excel + Python
demo.desc: In Excel, type =PY( and then describe your data analysis in plain English. Copilot writes the Python code for you.

prompts.label: Meeting summary
prompts.text: [In Teams meeting recap] Summarize this meeting, list all action items with owners and deadlines, and identify any unresolved decisions.

prompts.label: Email draft
prompts.text: [In Outlook] Draft a professional follow-up email to [name] after our product demo. Highlight the 3 key benefits we discussed and propose next steps.

pricing.note: Copilot.microsoft.com is free. Copilot in Microsoft 365 apps requires a separate Copilot for Microsoft 365 license on top of your existing M365 subscription.

vi.shortDesc: Trợ lý AI tích hợp trong Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Teams và toàn bộ hệ sinh thái Microsoft 365.
vi.fullDesc: Microsoft Copilot tích hợp sức mạnh GPT-5 trực tiếp vào các ứng dụng Office. Tóm tắt email, tạo slide, phân tích dữ liệu Excel và quản lý cuộc họp Teams tự động.

zh.shortDesc: 集成在Word、Excel、PowerPoint、Teams和整个Microsoft 365生态系统中的AI助手。
zh.fullDesc: Microsoft Copilot将GPT-5的能力直接整合到Office应用中。自动摘要邮件、创建幻灯片、分析Excel数据和管理Teams会议。

tools.name: FLUX
tools.shortDesc: Best-in-class photorealistic image generation — open weights available.
tools.fullDesc: FLUX by Black Forest Labs (creators of Stable Diffusion) is widely considered the highest-quality open image model. FLUX.1 Pro produces photorealistic images with exceptional prompt adherence. Open-weight variants (Schnell, Dev) can be run locally.

info.label: Models
info.value: FLUX.1 Pro, Dev, Schnell

info.label: Type
info.value: Diffusion Transformer

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free (open) / API from $0.04/img

features: State-of-the-art photorealism — beats Midjourney on realism
Excellent prompt adherence even on complex scenes
FLUX.1 Schnell & Dev: open weights, run locally
FLUX.1 Pro: best quality via API
Fine-tuning supported: train LoRAs on custom subjects
Available in Replicate, ComfyUI, Fal.ai, and more

demo.title: Try FLUX on Replicate
demo.desc: Go to replicate.com/black-forest-labs/flux-pro and run instantly — first images free.

demo.title: Use in ComfyUI
demo.desc: Install ComfyUI and download FLUX.1 Dev weights from HuggingFace for local generation.
demo.code:
huggingface-cli download black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-dev
# Then load in ComfyUI FLUX workflow

demo.title: API integration
demo.desc: Use via fal.ai or Replicate API for production apps.
demo.code:
curl -X POST https://fal.run/fal-ai/flux-pro
  -H "Authorization: Key $FAL_KEY"
  -d '{"prompt":"cinematic portrait..."}'

prompts.label: Photorealistic portrait
prompts.text: photorealistic portrait of a woman in her 30s, soft natural window light, shallow depth of field, sony a7iv, 85mm f1.4, ultra detailed skin texture, documentary style

prompts.label: Product photo
prompts.text: commercial product photography of a luxury perfume bottle on marble surface, dramatic side lighting, perfect reflections, 4K, studio quality, white background

pricing.note: FLUX.1 Schnell and Dev are open-source (Apache 2.0). FLUX.1 Pro is closed and available via API through Black Forest Labs or third-party providers.

vi.shortDesc: Tạo ảnh siêu thực tế hàng đầu — mã nguồn mở, nhanh và chất lượng vượt trội.
vi.fullDesc: FLUX của Black Forest Labs là mô hình tạo ảnh mã nguồn mở đạt chất lượng ảnh siêu thực tế vượt trội. FLUX.1 Pro và Dev được dùng rộng rãi trong sản xuất chuyên nghiệp.

zh.shortDesc: 顶级超写实图像生成 — 开源、快速、质量卓越。
zh.fullDesc: Black Forest Labs的FLUX是实现卓越超写实图像质量的开源模型。FLUX.1 Pro和Dev广泛用于专业生产环境。

tools.name: Ideogram
tools.shortDesc: #1 for accurate text rendering in images — logos, posters, social graphics.
tools.fullDesc: Ideogram solves one of AI's hardest problems: generating readable, accurate text inside images. Version 3.0 handles logos, posters, banners, and any design where typography must be perfect. The only tool that reliably renders text without spelling errors.

info.label: Version
info.value: Ideogram 3.0

info.label: Best for
info.value: Text in images, logos, posters

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free 10/day / from $8/mo

features: Best-in-class text rendering inside generated images
Typography mode: full control over fonts and placement
Magic Fill: inpainting for precise region editing
Style reference: match the look of any image

demo.title: Sign up
demo.desc: Go to ideogram.ai — free tier gives 10 priority images per day.

demo.title: Enable Text Mode
demo.desc: Toggle "Text" when your prompt includes words to render inside the image.

demo.title: Write a text-heavy prompt
demo.desc: Describe what text should appear and where.
demo.code: A minimalist coffee shop logo. Text says "BREW HOUSE" in bold sans-serif, black on white, circular badge design, clean vector style

demo.title: Use Magic Fill
demo.desc: Upload an existing image and use Magic Fill to edit specific regions while keeping the rest intact.

pricing.note: Free tier is limited to 10 priority images/day. Paid plans unlock private generations, batch mode, and commercial rights.

vi.shortDesc: #1 về render chữ trong ảnh — logo, poster, thiết kế với text hoàn hảo.
vi.fullDesc: Ideogram là công cụ tạo ảnh AI duy nhất render chữ một cách chính xác và đẹp trong ảnh. Lý tưởng cho logo, poster, thumbnail và mọi thiết kế cần text.

zh.shortDesc: 图像中文字渲染第一 — 完美的Logo、海报和含文字设计。
zh.fullDesc: Ideogram是唯一能在图像中准确、美观地渲染文字的AI图像工具，非常适合Logo、海报、缩略图和任何需要文字的设计。

tools.name: Kling AI
tools.shortDesc: Best-in-class realistic video generation — #1 for hand rendering and physical accuracy.
tools.fullDesc: Kling AI by Kuaishou is widely considered the most photorealistic video generation model, particularly for human subjects. Kling 3.0 produces 4K video with native audio, exceptional hand rendering (solving the notorious AI hand problem), and up to 2-minute clips.

info.label: Models
info.value: <cite index="1-10">Kling 3.0 Turbo and Omni launched on June 17, 2026</cite>. Current models include <cite index="2-14">Kling 2.1, Kling 2.5/2.5 Turbo Pro, Kling 2.6, Kling 3.0, and Kling Video O1</cite>

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="1-3,1-4">Kling AI is a text-to-video and image-to-video generator built by Kuaishou that creates short, high-motion video clips from written prompts or still photos, with strong physics simulation and character consistency</cite>

info.label: Released
info.value: <cite index="1-10">Kling 3.0 Turbo and Omni launched on June 17, 2026</cite>, with <cite index="10-16">Kling 3.0 released February 5, 2026</cite>

info.label: Pricing
info.value: <cite index="1-2">Kling AI uses a credit-based pricing model that starts free and climbs to roughly $130 per month at the top tier in 2026</cite>. <cite index="1-12">New users can claim 66 free credits each month</cite>

features: Best human realism — solves the AI hand problem
Native audio generation synchronized with video
AI Director: consistent characters across multiple shots
Image-to-video: animate any photo with precise control

demo.title: Sign up at Kling AI

prompts.label: Portrait video

pricing.note: Kling uses a credit system. Credits are consumed per second of video. The free tier resets daily. Paid plans give monthly credit pools.

vi.shortDesc: Tạo video thực tế hàng đầu — #1 cho render bàn tay và chuyển động tự nhiên nhất.

zh.shortDesc: 顶级写实视频生成 — 手部渲染和自然动作第一名。

tools.name: Luma Dream Machine
tools.shortDesc: Fast, photorealistic video generation with gorgeous aesthetic quality.
tools.fullDesc: Luma Dream Machine (Ray3) is renowned for its fluid, dreamy motion quality and excellent prompt adherence. It's one of the fastest video generators available, making it ideal for rapid iteration and social content. Ray3 supports 4K HDR and is available in Adobe Firefly.

info.label: Models
info.value: Ray 3.14 (latest, native 1080p, 4x faster, 3x cheaper at 720p); Ray 3 (supports Character Reference, HDR/EXR workflows); Ray 2

info.label: Context
info.value: Luma Dream Machine is an AI video generation platform offering text-to-video, image-to-video, and video-to-video (Ray3 Modify) capabilities. Supports keyframe control, character reference, HDR output, and up to 10-second clips per generation, extendable to ~30 seconds.

info.label: Released
info.value: Ray 3.14 released January 26, 2026. Ray 3 Modify released June 2025. Two pricing structures coexist: Legacy Dream Machine and new Luma Agents platform (launched March 2026).

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Dream Machine: Free, Lite ($9.99/mo), Plus ($29.99/mo), Unlimited ($94.99/mo). Luma Agents: Plus ($30/mo), Pro ($90/mo), Ultra ($300/mo). No free tier on Agents. Both support monthly or yearly billing (save ~17%).

features: Fast generation — results in under 2 minutes
Excellent motion quality with fluid physics
Generate from text, image, or video reference

demo.title: Image-to-video

demo.title: Extend a clip
demo.desc: After generating, click "Extend" to continue the video seamlessly for additional seconds.

tools.name: HeyGen

Used by thousands of companies for training, sales, and marketing.

tools.name: Pika

tools.fullDesc: Pika is built for creative social media content and rapid iteration. Its unique features — Pikaswaps (swap objects in video), Pikaframes (animate between images), and Pikaffects (special effects) — make it the most fun and expressive video tool for creators.

info.label: Context

info.value: Pika 2.5 is current flagship as of 2026

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free ($0): 80 credits/month, 480p; Standard ($8/mo annual): 700 credits; Pro ($28/mo annual): 2,300 credits; Fancy ($76/mo annual): 6,000 credits. Monthly billing ~20% higher.

features: Pikaswaps: swap any object in a video with AI

tools.name: NotebookLM
tools.shortDesc: Upload your documents and have an AI that's grounded 100% in your sources.

info.label: Documents supported
info.value: PDF, Docs, Slides, URLs, YouTube

info.label: Context
info.value: Up to 500 sources / 25M tokens

info.label: Pricing

features: Answers grounded entirely in your uploaded sources — no hallucinations
Audio Overview: generates a 2-host podcast from any document
Add YouTube videos, PDFs, Google Docs, websites
Automatic source citations for every claim
Study guides, briefing docs, FAQ generation

demo.title: Open NotebookLM
demo.desc: Go to notebooklm.google.com — free with any Google account.

demo.title: Create a notebook
demo.desc: Click "New Notebook" and upload your sources: PDFs, paste text, add URLs or YouTube links.

demo.title: Ask questions
demo.desc: Ask anything about your sources. Every answer includes inline citations with exact quotes.

demo.title: Generate an Audio Overview
demo.desc: Click "Audio Overview" in the right panel — your documents become a 10-20 minute podcast in minutes.

prompts.label: Research summary
prompts.text: Summarize the key findings across all my uploaded papers. What are the main themes, agreements, and contradictions between sources?

prompts.label: Briefing doc
prompts.text: Create a concise executive briefing document from these sources. 1-page format: context, key facts, implications, and recommended actions.

pricing.note: NotebookLM is currently free. NotebookLM Plus (for larger teams and higher limits) is in preview for Google One subscribers.

vi.shortDesc: Tải tài liệu lên và có AI chỉ biết về nội dung của bạn — trả lời với trích dẫn chính xác.
vi.fullDesc: NotebookLM của Google cho phép bạn upload tài liệu và đặt câu hỏi với AI được grounded 100% vào nội dung đó. Không hallucinate, mọi câu trả lời đều có trích dẫn nguồn.

zh.shortDesc: 上传文档，让AI仅基于您的内容回答 — 带精确引用来源。

tools.name: Lovable
tools.shortDesc: Build production-ready full-stack apps from prompts — the #1 vibe coding platform.
tools.fullDesc: Lovable is the fastest-growing AI app builder — millions of apps built. It generates full-stack web apps (React frontend + Supabase backend + auth) from plain English. Unlike Bolt or Replit, Lovable ships production-ready apps with databases, auth, and deployment baked in.

info.label: Context
info.value: AI app builder that generates full-stack React/TypeScript apps with Supabase backend

info.label: Released
info.value: Lovable 2.0 released April 2025; latest updates January-June 2026

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free ($0/month, 5 daily credits), Pro ($25/month, 100 monthly credits), Business ($50/month), Enterprise (custom). Credits consume based on complexity: 0.5 credits for styling changes, ~1.2 for authentication, 2+ for landing pages

features: Full-stack generation: frontend + backend + database + auth
Supabase integration: real database, real-time, file storage
Built-in authentication out of the box
GitHub sync: push and pull code at any time
Custom domain deployment in one click
Visual editor: modify UI without prompting

demo.title: Sign up at Lovable

Build a project management tool with:
- User authentication (signup/login)
- Create and assign tasks
- Kanban board with drag-and-drop
- Due dates and priority labels
- Team collaboration

tools.name: n8n
tools.shortDesc: Open-source workflow automation with native AI nodes — the developer-friendly Zapier.
tools.fullDesc: n8n is an open-source workflow automation tool that combines visual workflow building with code capability. Its native AI nodes let you build AI agents, chain LLM calls, and create complex automations that interact with 400+ apps. Self-hostable for full data control.

info.label: Models
info.value: n8n is a workflow automation platform (not traditional AI model versions). Current stable version: 2.x series (latest 2.28.7 as of July 2026)

info.label: Context
info.value: Open-source workflow automation platform with 400+ integrations, visual node-based editor, native AI capabilities, self-hosted and cloud deployment options

info.label: Released
info.value: Latest release: July 8-9, 2026 (v2.28.7). n8n releases new minor versions most weeks

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Cloud plans: Starter €20/month (2,500 executions), Pro €50/month (10,000 executions), Business €667/month (40,000 executions). Enterprise: custom pricing. Self-hosted Community Edition: free with unlimited executions (infrastructure cost only ~€5-7/month)

features: Visual workflow builder with code escape hatch
Native AI Agent node: build autonomous agents
Chain LLM calls with memory and tools
Self-hostable: run on your own server for free
HTTP Request node: connect to any API

demo.title: Self-host n8n
demo.desc: Run n8n locally in seconds with Docker.
demo.code:
docker run -it --rm \
  --name n8n \
  -p 5678:5678 \
  n8nio/n8n

demo.title: Or use n8n Cloud
demo.desc: Sign up at n8n.io for the managed cloud version with a free 14-day trial.

demo.title: Build an AI workflow
demo.desc: Add an AI Agent node, connect it to your LLM (OpenAI/Claude), give it tools (email, calendar, HTTP), and deploy.

demo.title: Connect apps
demo.desc: Browse the 400+ integrations. Use credentials manager to store API keys securely.

prompts.label: AI agent workflow
prompts.text: Build an n8n workflow that: (1) receives a webhook when a new support ticket arrives, (2) uses GPT-4o to classify urgency and generate a response, (3) sends the response via email, (4) logs to Notion.

prompts.label: Data pipeline
prompts.text: Create a workflow that runs daily: fetches sales data from our API, processes it with code, generates a summary using Claude, and posts it to our Slack #analytics channel.

pricing.note: Self-hosting is completely free with no limits. Cloud plans are billed per workflow execution. Fair-code license allows free self-hosting for most commercial uses.

vi.shortDesc: Tự động hóa workflow mã nguồn mở với AI node native — giải pháp Make/Zapier cho developer.
vi.fullDesc: n8n là nền tảng tự động hóa workflow mã nguồn mở với giao diện kéo thả và hỗ trợ AI node native. Có thể self-host, hỗ trợ 400+ integration và logic phức tạp hơn Zapier.

zh.shortDesc: 带原生AI节点的开源工作流自动化 — 开发者版Make/Zapier。
zh.fullDesc: n8n是带拖拽界面和原生AI节点支持的开源工作流自动化平台。可自托管，支持400+集成和比Zapier更复杂的逻辑。

tools.name: Claude Code
tools.shortDesc: Anthropic's terminal-native coding agent — understands and rewrites entire codebases.
tools.fullDesc: Claude Code is Anthropic's answer to Devin and Codex CLI: a terminal-based agentic tool that reads your entire codebase, understands the full context, and can autonomously plan and execute complex engineering tasks — refactoring, feature building, bug fixing — across thousands of files.

info.label: Models
info.value: Sonnet 5 (default on Pro), Opus 4.8, Fable 5, Haiku 4.5

info.label: Context
info.value: 200K tokens (Pro/Max/Team), 500K tokens (Enterprise)

info.label: Released
info.value: Claude Code is bundled with Claude subscriptions (no standalone release)

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Pro: $20/month, Max 5x: $100/month, Max 20x: $200/month, Team Premium: $100/seat/month (minimum 5 seats), API: $3-10 per million input tokens, $15-50 per million output tokens

features: Reads and understands your entire codebase
Autonomous execution: writes, edits, tests, fixes
Git integration: creates branches and commits
Works best with Claude Max ($100/mo) subscription

demo.title: Install Claude Code
demo.desc: Install via npm globally.
demo.code:
npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
claude --version

demo.title: Authenticate
demo.desc: Log in with your Anthropic account or API key.
demo.code:
claude auth login
# or
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...

demo.title: Run in your project
demo.desc: Navigate to your repo and start a session.
demo.code:
cd my-project
claude
> Add dark mode support to the entire app

demo.title: Let it work autonomously
demo.desc: Claude Code plans the changes, creates a branch, edits files, runs tests, and reports back. Use /review to see a diff before committing.

prompts.label: Feature build
prompts.text: Add user authentication to this Express app. Use JWT + bcrypt, create login/signup endpoints, protect all /api routes, add refresh token support, and write integration tests.

prompts.label: Codebase refactor
prompts.text: Analyze the entire codebase and refactor it to use TypeScript. Convert all .js files, add proper types, fix any type errors, and update the build config.

pricing.note: Claude Code uses the Anthropic API. Most users find Claude Max ($100/mo with 5x usage limits) to be the most cost-effective for heavy Claude Code usage.

plans.name: Claude Pro
features: Can hit limits on large tasks

plans.name: Claude Max
features: Best for heavy Claude Code use

vi.shortDesc: Agent lập trình trong terminal của Anthropic — hiểu và thực thi tác vụ coding phức tạp.
vi.fullDesc: Claude Code là agent lập trình của Anthropic chạy trong terminal, có thể đọc toàn bộ codebase và thực thi các tác vụ phức tạp. Được đánh giá cao nhất về khả năng theo dõi ngữ cảnh dài.

zh.shortDesc: Anthropic的终端原生编程代理 — 理解并执行复杂编程任务。
zh.fullDesc: Claude Code是Anthropic在终端中运行的编程代理，能读取整个代码库并执行复杂任务。在长上下文跟踪能力方面评价最高。

tools.name: Perplexity Deep Research
tools.shortDesc: Autonomous multi-step research agent that generates comprehensive reports with sources.
tools.fullDesc: Perplexity Deep Research is an autonomous research agent that runs dozens of web searches, synthesizes findings from 20+ sources, and produces a detailed, cited research report — all in 5-10 minutes. Dramatically faster than manual research.

info.label: Type
info.value: Autonomous research agent

info.label: Sources per report
info.value: 20-50 sources

info.label: Time per report
info.value: 5-10 minutes

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Perplexity Pro ($20/mo)

features: Runs 20-50 independent web searches per report
Synthesizes across academic papers, news, and forums
Produces structured reports with full citations
Follows up on promising leads autonomously
Export to PDF or share as Perplexity Page
Works with Sonar Pro model for highest quality

demo.title: Open Perplexity Pro
demo.desc: Go to perplexity.ai with a Pro account. Click "Deep Research" mode in the search bar.

demo.title: Enter your research question
demo.desc: Ask a complex, open-ended question that would normally require hours of research.

demo.title: Wait 5-10 minutes
demo.desc: Watch as Perplexity runs multiple search rounds, following leads and refining its findings automatically.

demo.title: Review and export
demo.desc: Get a fully cited report. Export to PDF, share as a Perplexity Page, or ask follow-up questions.

prompts.label: Competitive analysis
prompts.text: Do deep research on the competitive landscape for AI coding tools in 2026. Cover key players, pricing, market share estimates, recent funding, and user sentiment. Cite sources.

prompts.label: Investment research
prompts.text: Research the current state of AI chip companies: Nvidia, AMD, Intel, TSMC, and emerging players. Analyze market positions, recent earnings, supply constraints, and 12-month outlook.

pricing.note: Deep Research is a Pro-only feature. Each Deep Research report counts as a Pro Search usage.

vi.shortDesc: Agent nghiên cứu tự động tạo báo cáo toàn diện với nguồn trích dẫn đầy đủ.
vi.fullDesc: Perplexity Pages là tính năng nghiên cứu sâu của Perplexity, tự động tìm kiếm nhiều nguồn và tổng hợp thành báo cáo có cấu trúc với trích dẫn đầy đủ.

zh.shortDesc: 自主多步研究代理，生成带完整引用的综合报告。
zh.fullDesc: Perplexity Pages是Perplexity的深度研究功能，自动搜索多个来源并综合成带完整引用的结构化报告。

tools.name: Qwen (Alibaba)
tools.shortDesc: Alibaba's world-class LLM — ultra-cheap API, open weights, strong on coding & reasoning.
tools.fullDesc: Qwen (Tongyi Qianwen) by Alibaba is consistently topping global benchmarks while offering some of the lowest API prices in the industry. Qwen 3.5 235B competes with GPT-4o at a fraction of the cost. Open-weight variants are free to download and run locally.

info.label: Models
info.value: <cite index="4-3">Qwen3.7-Max is the flagship closed-weight model announced on May 20, 2026 with 1M-context and reasoning-native capabilities. Qwen3.6-35B-A3B is the open-weight Apache 2.0 model. The family also includes Qwen3.5-397B-A17B MoE, Qwen3.6-27B, Qwen3.7-Plus, and smaller variants from 0.5B to 235B parameters.</cite>

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="4-3">Qwen3.7-Max supports 1M-token context</cite>. <cite index="1-7">The Qwen family is a sprawling catalogue of more than 145 model IDs spanning text, vision, audio, code, translation, video generation, and embeddings.</cite>

info.label: Released
info.value: <cite index="4-3">Qwen3.7-Max was officially announced on May 20, 2026 at the Alibaba Cloud Summit. Qwen3.6 was released in April 2026 in two waves (April 16 and April 22). Qwen3.5 was released in February 2026.</cite>

info.label: Pricing
info.value: <cite index="8-1">Qwen3.7-Max pricing is $2.50/$7.50 per 1M tokens. Qwen3.6-Plus is $0.325/$1.95 per 1M input/output tokens. Qwen3.5-397B-A17B is $0.39/$2.34 per 1M tokens. Qwen3.6-35B-A3B (open-weight) is $0.15/$1.00 per 1M tokens. Smaller models start from $0.05 per 1M input tokens.</cite>

features: Top benchmark scores rivaling GPT-4o at 8-20x lower cost
Vision models: Qwen-VL for image understanding
Free API tier on Alibaba Cloud Model Studio

demo.title: API via Alibaba Cloud

User: Solve this math problem step by step /think

tools.name: Leonardo AI

Using a drag-and-drop interface, you can automate data flows, orchestrate AI agents, and integrate tools across marketing, sales, operations, finance, and IT.</cite>

info.value: <cite index="4-17">In 2020, Integromat was acquired by Celonis, and in 2022 the platform was rebranded as Make</cite>

info.label: Pricing

features: Visual canvas: see data flowing through every step in real time
Complex logic: routers, iterators, aggregators, error handlers
Data transformation: built-in JSON, math, text, and date functions
Webhooks included on free plan (Zapier charges for them)
Make AI: AI steps for text generation and classification
5x more operations per dollar vs Zapier

demo.title: Sign up
demo.desc: Go to make.com — free plan includes 1,000 operations/month.

demo.title: Create a scenario
demo.desc: Click "Create a new scenario" and drag modules onto the canvas. Connect them visually.

demo.title: Add data transforms

demo.title: Test live
demo.desc: Click "Run once" to see data flowing through every module in real time — great for debugging.

prompts.label: Complex data flow
prompts.text: Build a Make scenario: when a Stripe payment is received → fetch customer details from Airtable → if order > $500: send priority email and Slack alert → update order status in Airtable → add to Google Sheets monthly report.

prompts.label: AI pipeline
prompts.text: Create a Make scenario that monitors a Gmail label "To Analyze". For each email: extract key info with GPT-4o, categorize it, and store structured data in Notion with auto-generated summary.

pricing.note: An "operation" is one module execution. A 5-module scenario running 200 times = 1,000 operations. Much better value than Zapier for power users.

vi.shortDesc: Tự động hóa workflow trực quan với sức mạnh và linh hoạt hơn Zapier.

tools.name: GPT-5
tools.shortDesc: OpenAI's flagship 2026 model — 400K context, native multimodal, computer use, and configurable reasoning.
tools.fullDesc: GPT-5 represents a decisive leap over the GPT-4 era. Released throughout 2025 and into 2026, it features configurable reasoning effort, native multimodal input (text, image, audio), a 400K context window, and native computer use. The March 2026 GPT-5.4 release unified general-purpose and coding lines into a single flagship model.

info.label: Released

features: Configurable reasoning effort — dial up compute for hard tasks, save on simple ones
Native multimodal: text, image, and audio in a single request
400K context window — process entire codebases or long documents
Computer use: natively interacts with applications and browsers
GPT-5.4 unifies general-purpose and coding model lines
90%+ MMLU-Pro score — among the highest in the industry
Available via ChatGPT, API, Azure OpenAI, and Microsoft Copilot

tools.name: Sunday Robots
tools.shortDesc: AI-powered household robot that learns from real-world human demonstrations to handle everyday chores autonomously.
tools.fullDesc: Sunday Robots (Memo) is an autonomous household robot engineered to help families with chores like dishes, laundry, and tidying. Trained on 10 million real-world household episodes from 500+ homes using the proprietary Skill Capture Glove, Memo learns human movements and replicates them with precision. The robot combines a stable wheeled base with dual grippers and AI models (ACT-1 foundation) to perform complex, multi-step tasks in unpredictable home environments.

info.label: Models
info.value: <cite index="1-7">Memo - Sunday's wheeled, semi-humanoid home robot</cite>

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="1-18">Memo is a wheeled home robot that uses ACT-1 and real-home training data to clear tables, load dishwashers and fold laundry autonomously</cite>. <cite index="1-24">It clears tables, loads the dishwasher, folds laundry and pulls espresso shots</cite>.

info.label: Released
info.value: <cite index="4-12">The first batch of robots should roll out to select households by Thanksgiving in 2026</cite>. <cite index="12-1">Memo will not be available for purchase until after beta testing in 2026</cite>.

info.label: Pricing
info.value: <cite index="1-1">Building a single Memo by hand costs roughly $20,000 today, and Sunday has publicly said it's targeting a future retail price under $10,000 once it can manufacture at scale</cite>. <cite index="2-1">Large-scale manufacturing will meaningfully reduce costs by at least 50%, and exact pricing will be announced closer to launch</cite>.

features: Trained on 10 million real-world household episodes from 500+ homes using proprietary Skill Capture Glove
ACT-1 foundation model using imitation learning and diffusion policy for dexterous manipulation
Autonomous operation without teleoperation; learns directly from human demonstrations
Multi-gripper design with precision control for handling fragile items like wine glasses
Wheeled base with telescoping spine reaching 7 feet; stable and safe for families with children
Can perform dishes, laundry, espresso-making, table clearing, and multi-step household tasks
Soft silicone-clad design with passive stability (remains stable during power loss)
Skill Transform pipeline converts human glove data to robot-compatible actions with 90% success rate

vi.shortDesc: Robot gia đình được hỗ trợ bởi AI, học từ các hành động thực tế của con người để tự động xử lý các công việc hàng ngày.
vi.fullDesc: Sunday Robots (Memo) là một robot gia đình tự động được thiết kế để giúp các gia đình với các công việc như rửa chén, giặt là và dọn dẹp. Được đào tạo trên 10 triệu tập phim gia đình thực tế từ hơn 500 ngôi nhà bằng Skill Capture Glove độc quyền, Memo học các chuyển động của con người và sao chép chúng với độ chính xác cao. Robot kết hợp nền tảng bánh xe ổn định với hai tay nắm kép và các mô hình AI (nền tảng ACT-1) để thực hiện các nhiệm vụ phức tạp, đa bước trong các môi trường gia đình không thể dự đoán được.

zh.shortDesc: 由人工智能驱动的家用机器人，通过学习真实人类演示来自主处理日常家务。
zh.fullDesc: Sunday Robots（Memo）是一款自主家用机器人，旨在帮助家庭完成洗碗、洗衣和��理等家务。通过使用专有的Skill Capture Glove从500多个家庭的1000万真实家务数据集中进行训练，Memo学习人类的动作并以精确度复制这些动作。该机器人结合了稳定的轮式底座、双臂夹持器和AI模型（ACT-1基础），能够在不可预测的家庭环境中完成复杂的多步任务。

tools.name: Livedocs
tools.shortDesc: AI-native IDE combining SQL, Python, and natural language for instant data insights.
tools.fullDesc: Livedocs is a modern notebook platform that transforms raw data into actionable insights using AI. Unlike traditional notebooks, cells automatically re-run when dependencies change, and users can analyze data through SQL, Python, or natural language queries, then publish interactive dashboards without coding.

info.label: Type
info.value: AI-Native Data Analysis IDE

info.label: Best for
info.value: Data analysts, engineers, and non-technical teams needing instant insights

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Freemium: $0-$30+ per workspace/month

features: AI agent that understands data context and generates SQL/Python code automatically
Reactive notebooks with dependency tracking like spreadsheets
Real-time collaboration with team members in shared workspaces
Built-in SQL, Python, and chart creation in a single IDE
Publish interactive dashboards and shareable apps without deployment code
Connect live data from databases, APIs, and services like Stripe and Google Analytics
Natural language interface to ask questions and get charts instantly
Terminal access and machine learning capabilities for advanced analysis

vi.shortDesc: IDE hỗ trợ AI kết hợp SQL, Python và ngôn ngữ tự nhiên để có cái nhìn sâu sắc về dữ liệu tức thì.
vi.fullDesc: Livedocs là nền tảng notebook hiện đại biến dữ liệu thô thành những thông tin hữu ích hành động bằng AI. Khác với các notebook truyền thống, các cell tự động chạy lại khi phụ thuộc thay đổi, và người dùng có thể phân tích dữ liệu thông qua các truy vấn SQL, Python hoặc ngôn ngữ tự nhiên, sau đó xuất bản dashboard tương tác mà không cần viết code.

zh.shortDesc: 原生AI IDE，结合SQL、Python和自然语言，提供即时数据洞察。
zh.fullDesc: Livedocs是一个现代化笔记本平台，利用AI将原始数据转化为可操作的洞察。与传统笔记本不同，当依赖项改变时，单元格会自动重新运行，用户可以通过SQL、Python或自然语言查询分析数据，然后无需编码即可发布交互式仪表板。

tools.name: Primitive
tools.shortDesc: AI agent operating system for regulated financial institutions with enterprise governance and compliance.
tools.fullDesc: Primitive is an enterprise AI agent operating system purpose-built for regulated financial institutions to create, deploy, and govern agentic execution at scale. It provides bank-grade controls, third-party integrations, and measurable ROI frameworks to move AI from pilots to production workloads. The platform is designed for operations teams seeking to deploy accountable, auditable AI agents across banking workflows.

features: The Engine Room component connects AI agents directly to enterprise systems without replacing existing infrastructure
The Assembler rapidly builds production-ready agents from use cases in approximately 90 days
The Control Tower delivers comprehensive governance through logging, tracing, and compliance validation
Pre-built agent templates for commercial lending, operations, risk/compliance, and regulatory oversight
Agent Capital framework and Return on Agent Capital (ROAC) metrics for quantifying AI value
MX partnership enables AI-native Growth Agent for deposit identification and personalized banking campaigns
Third-party agent orchestration with unified governance across internal and external agents
Auditable decision trails and performance measurement with bank-grade compliance standards

vi.shortDesc: Hệ điều hành AI agent cho các tổ chức tài chính được quản lý với quản trị doanh nghiệp và tuân thủ.
vi.fullDesc: Primitive là hệ điều hành AI agent cấp doanh nghiệp được xây dựng đặc biệt cho các tổ chức tài chính được quản lý nhằm tạo, triển khai và quản lý thực thi agent quy mô lớn. Nó cung cấp các điều khiển cấp ngân hàng, tích hợp bên thứ ba và khung ROI có thể đo lường để chuyển AI từ các dự án thí điểm sang khối lượng công việc sản xuất. Nền tảng được thiết kế cho các đội vận hành tìm cách triển khai các agent AI có trách nhiệm và có thể kiểm toán trên các quy trình làm việc ngân hàng.

zh.shortDesc: 为受监管金融机构设计的AI代理操作系统，具有企业治理和合规功能。
zh.fullDesc: Primitive是专为受监管金融机构设计的企业级AI代理操作系统，用于大规模创建、部署和管理代理执行。它提供银行级控制、第三方集成和可衡量的ROI框架，将AI从试点项目转移到生产工作负载。该平台为寻求在银行工作流程中部署可追踪、可审计的AI代理的运营团队而设计。

tools.name: Google AI Edge Eloquent
tools.shortDesc: Advanced offline dictation app that transforms messy speech into professional text using Google's Gemma AI.
tools.fullDesc: Google AI Edge Eloquent is an offline-first dictation app powered by Google's Gemma models that automatically transforms natural speech into polished, professional text. It filters out filler words and self-corrections while maintaining context and meaning. Perfect for professionals, writers, and anyone looking to capture thoughts quickly without manual editing.

info.label: Released
info.value: April 2026

features: Offline speech-to-text processing using Gemma-based ASR models with no internet required
Automatic filtering of filler words like 'um' and 'uh' plus self-corrections for clean prose
Real-time transcription display with live waveform visualization as you dictate
Text transformation options including Key Points, Formal, Short, or Long tone adjustments
Personal context dictionary that learns from your vocabulary and Gmail contacts for accuracy
Optional cloud mode using Gemini models for enhanced text polishing on complex sentences
Session history tracking with performance stats including words-per-minute and word count
Direct clipboard export for seamless pasting into other apps

vi.fullDesc: Google AI Edge Eloquent là ứng dụng chính tả hoạt động ngoại tuyến được hỗ trợ bởi các mô hình Gemma của Google, tự động chuyển đổi lời nói tự nhiên thành văn bản sáng sủa và chuyên nghiệp. Nó lọc ra các từ lấp liếm và tự sửa chữa trong khi vẫn giữ ngữ cảnh và ý nghĩa. Hoàn hảo cho các chuyên gia, nhà văn và bất kỳ ai muốn ghi lại ý tưởng nhanh chóng mà không cần chỉnh sửa thủ công.

tools.name: Poke
tools.shortDesc: AI agent accessible via iMessage, SMS, and Telegram for everyday automation without complex setup.
tools.fullDesc: Poke is a messaging-first AI agent that brings agentic AI to everyday users through familiar text interfaces. It handles calendar management, email alerts, health tracking, smart home control, photo editing, and custom automations through plain-text conversations, designed for non-technical users who want task automation without learning terminal commands or installing new apps.

info.value: Uses various AI models depending on task - proprietary models from major AI providers and open source models

info.label: Context
info.value: Single-model AI agent accessed via iMessage, SMS, Telegram, WhatsApp (limited). Integrates with email, calendar, health trackers, smart home systems, photo editing. Accessible via text messaging without app download.

info.label: Released

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free to start; flexible usage-based pricing for advanced real-time automations

features: Accessible via iMessage, SMS, Telegram, and WhatsApp (select markets)
Pre-built "recipes" for automation across productivity, health, finance, travel, and developer tools
User-authored automations shareable with plain-text syntax
Real-time integrations with Gmail, Google Calendar, Outlook, Notion, Linear, GitHub, and 30+ other services
Proactive alerts and reminders without manual prompting
Multi-layered security with SOC 2 Type II, CASA Tier 2, and regular penetration testing
Privacy-first design where team cannot access token content by default
Creator economy incentives: $0.10-$1.00 per user signup for shared recipes

vi.shortDesc: Tác nhân AI có thể truy cập qua iMessage, SMS và Telegram để tự động hóa hàng ngày mà không cần cấu hình phức tạp.
vi.fullDesc: Poke là một tác nhân AI hướng tới tin nhắn, mang khả năng agentic AI đến người dùng hàng ngày thông qua các giao diện văn bản quen thuộc. Nó xử lý quản lý lịch, cảnh báo email, theo dõi sức khỏe, điều khiển nhà thông minh, chỉnh sửa ảnh và tự động hóa tùy chỉnh thông qua các cuộc trò chuyện văn bản thuần túy, được thiết kế cho những người dùng không chuyên về kỹ thuật muốn tự động hóa tác vụ mà không cần học các lệnh terminal hoặc cài đặt ứng dụng mới.

zh.shortDesc: 通过 iMessage、SMS 和 Telegram 访问的 AI 助手，无需复杂设置即可实现日常自动化。
zh.fullDesc: Poke 是一个以消息为中心的 AI 助手，通过熟悉的文本界面为日常用户带来 AI 代理功能。它可以处理日历管理、电子邮件提醒、健康追踪、智能家居控制、照片编辑和自定义自动化任务，通过纯文本对话完成，专为不具备技术背景但希望实现任务自动化而不需要学习终端命令或安装新应用的用户设计。

tools.name: Noiz AI

tools.fullDesc: Noiz AI is an all-in-one audio creation platform that unites voice design, dubbing, and intelligent storytelling. From a single line of text, users can generate expressive voices, background music, and sound effects. The platform serves creators, podcasters, filmmakers, and developers seeking to produce lifelike audio content without fragmentation across multiple tools.

vi.shortDesc: Studio âm thanh AI để tạo giọng nói, âm nhạc và hiệu ứng âm thanh biểu cảm từ văn bản.
vi.fullDesc: Noiz AI là nền tảng tạo âm thanh toàn diện kết hợp thiết kế giọng nói, lồng tiếng và kể chuyện thông minh. Từ một dòng văn bản, người dùng có thể tạo giọng nói biểu cảm, nhạc nền và hiệu ứng âm thanh. Nền tảng phục vụ những người sáng tạo nội dung, podcast, nhà làm phim và nhà phát triển muốn tạo ra nội dung âm thanh sống động mà không cần sử dụng nhiều công cụ khác nhau.
