zh.fullDesc: Noiz AI是一个一站式音频创作平台，整合了语音设计、配音和智能叙事功能。用户只需一句文本，即可生成富有表现力的语音、背景音乐和音效。该平台服务于创作者、播客制作者、电影制作人和开发者，帮助他们创建逼真的音频内容，无需在多个工具之间切换。

tools.name: Claude Design
tools.shortDesc: AI tool that turns text prompts into interactive prototypes and presentations.
tools.fullDesc: <cite index="6-12">Claude Design is a new Anthropic Labs product that lets you collaborate with Claude to create polished visual work like designs, prototypes, slides, one-pagers, and more.</cite> <cite index="2-5">It is aimed at empowering company founders, product managers, and marketers to create professional designs and prototypes without needing a deep background in design.</cite> <cite index="6-13">Claude Design is powered by Claude Opus 4.7 and is available in research preview for Claude Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise subscribers.</cite>

info.label: Type
info.value: AI Design & Prototyping Tool

info.label: Released
info.value: April 2026

info.label: Best for
info.value: Rapid prototyping, presentations, non-designers

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Included with Claude subscription

features: <cite index="1-4,1-5">Ask for a signup page, pricing screen, or pitch slide, and Claude Design generates a first draft, which users can refine through chat-style instructions, in-canvas comments, direct edits, or custom sliders.</cite>
<cite index="6-2,6-3">Claude builds a design system for your team by reading your codebase and design files, automatically applying your colors, typography, and components to every project.</cite>

<cite index="5-3,5-4">Users can start from a text prompt, upload images and documents in various formats, point Claude at their codebase, or use a web capture tool to grab elements directly from a live website.</cite>

<cite index="5-6,5-7">When a design is ready to build, Claude packages everything into a handoff bundle that can be passed to Claude Code, creating a closed loop from exploration to prototype to production code.</cite>
<cite index="8-14">Designs can be shared as an internal URL within an organization, saved as a folder, or exported to Canva, PDF, PPTX, or standalone HTML files.</cite>
<cite index="3-11">Users can select an on-screen element and leave a comment for Claude, which immediately begins working on it.</cite>
<cite index="2-8">Claude Design provides features that allow multiple team members to access and edit the design together.</cite>
<cite index="4-11">It supports tasks like wireframing, prototyping and animation while maintaining alignment with brand guidelines.</cite>

vi.fullDesc: <cite index="6-12">Claude Design là một sản phẩm mới của Anthropic Labs cho phép bạn cộng tác với Claude để tạo các công việc hình ảnh chuyên nghiệp như thiết kế, nguyên mẫu, slide, one-pagers, và nhiều hơn nữa.</cite> <cite index="2-5">Nó nhằm mục đích trao quyền cho các nhà sáng lập công ty, quản lý sản phẩm và nhà tiếp thị để tạo các thiết kế và nguyên mẫu chuyên nghiệp mà không cần có nền tảng sâu về thiết kế.</cite> <cite index="6-13">Claude Design được hỗ trợ bởi Claude Opus 4.7 và có sẵn trong bản xem trước nghiên cứu cho các cấp độ Claude Pro, Max, Team và Enterprise.</cite>

tools.name: GPT-Rosalind
tools.shortDesc: <cite index="1-1">OpenAI's frontier reasoning model built to accelerate drug discovery, genomics analysis, protein reasoning, and scientific research workflows.</cite>
tools.fullDesc: <cite index="2-2">GPT-Rosalind is designed for advanced biological reasoning, scientific tool use, and multi-step workflows such as target discovery, target validation, genomics interpretation, pathway analysis, literature synthesis, and hypothesis generation.</cite> <cite index="2-3">The model is currently most useful for early discovery work, especially target biology, mechanism understanding, literature synthesis, and omics interpretation.</cite> <cite index="1-5">OpenAI is working with leading pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and research customers, as well as life sciences technology organizations, to apply GPT-Rosalind across workflows that drive discovery.</cite>

info.label: Models
info.value: GPT-Rosalind (based on GPT-5.5); Currently available only through trusted-access program for qualified life sciences organizations

info.label: Context
info.value: Purpose-built for biology, drug discovery, genomics, medicinal chemistry, and translational medicine; Includes tool-use capabilities and access to scientific databases

info.label: Released
info.value: Initial launch: April 16, 2026; Major update: June 3, 2026

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Not publicly disclosed; Available only through trusted-access research preview; No pricing announced by OpenAI

features: <cite index="4-1">Synthesizes evidence, generates biological hypotheses, and plans experiments—tasks that have traditionally required years of expert human synthesis.</cite>

<cite index="1-9">Evaluates core reasoning across scientific subdomains, including chemical reaction mechanisms; protein structure, mutation effects, and interactions; and phylogenetic interpretation of DNA sequences.</cite>
<cite index="4-3">Fine-tuned for deeper understanding across genomics, protein engineering, and chemistry.</cite>
<cite index="1-18">Includes a freely accessible Life Sciences research plugin for Codex, helping scientists connect models to over 50 scientific tools and data sources.</cite>
<cite index="2-10">Delivers enterprise-grade security controls and Regulated Workspaces with BAAs, SOC 2 Type 2 and HIPAA-aligned standards.</cite>

<cite index="1-10">Supports real research workflows by interpreting experimental outputs, identifying expert-relevant patterns, and synthesizing external information to design follow-up experiments.</cite>
<cite index="4-6">Outperformed comparison models on CloningQA—a task requiring end-to-end design of reagents for molecular cloning protocols.</cite>
<cite index="2-11">OpenAI does not train on customer data.</cite>

demo.desc: Generate testable biological hypotheses from incomplete data and experimental results

plans.name: Research Preview (Enterprise)
features: Access via ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex
Trusted access program with qualification review
No consumption of existing enterprise credits during preview

vi.shortDesc: <cite index="1-1">Mô hình lập luận tiên tiến của OpenAI được xây dựng để tăng tốc độ khám phá thuốc, phân tích genomics, lập luận protein và các quy trình nghiên cứu khoa học.</cite>
vi.fullDesc: <cite index="2-2">GPT-Rosalind được thiết kế cho lập luận sinh học nâng cao, sử dụng công cụ khoa học và các quy trình đa bước như khám phá mục tiêu, xác thực mục tiêu, giải thích genomics, phân tích con đường, tổng hợp tài liệu và tạo giả thuyết.</cite> <cite index="2-3">Mô hình hiện tại hữu ích nhất cho công việc khám phá sớm, đặc biệt là sinh học mục tiêu, hiểu biết cơ chế, tổng hợp tài liệu và giải thích omics.</cite> <cite index="1-5">OpenAI đang hợp tác với các khách hàng dược phẩm, công nghệ sinh học và nghiên cứu hàng đầu, cũng như các tổ chức công nghệ khoa học sự sống, để áp dụng GPT-Rosalind trên các quy trình thúc đẩy khám phá.</cite>

zh.shortDesc: <cite index="1-1">OpenAI 的前沿推理模型，旨在加速药���发现、基因组学分析、蛋白质推理和科学研究工作流。</cite>
zh.fullDesc: <cite index="2-2">GPT-Rosalind 专为高级生物推理、科学工具应用和多步骤工作流设计，包括靶点发现、靶点验证、基因组学解读、通路分析、文献合成和假设生成。</cite> <cite index="2-3">该模型目前最适用于早期发现工作，尤其是靶点生物学、机制理解、文献合成和组学解读。</cite> <cite index="1-5">OpenAI 正与领先的制药、生物技术和研究客户以及生命科学技术组织合作，在推动发现的工作流中应用 GPT-Rosalind。</cite>

changes: Combines GPT-5.5's agentic coding and tool-use capabilities with stronger life sciences domain intelligence
Outperforms GPT-5.5 on medicinal chemistry, genomics, and wet-lab benchmarks while using 31% fewer tokens in genomics
Expanded global research preview access to eligible organizations worldwide (previously US-only)
Added Life Sciences Research and Life Sciences NGS Analysis plugins for Codex
Launched Rosalind Biodefense initiative for defensive biodefense applications
Initial release of GPT-Rosalind as frontier reasoning model for life sciences
Available in ChatGPT Enterprise, Codex, and API for qualified customers
Life Sciences research plugin for Codex connecting to 50+ scientific tools and data sources
Free API usage during beta testing for approved organizations

tools.error: GPT-Rosalind does not have multiple versions or traditional pricing structure. It is a single research preview model in beta, available free to qualified enterprise research teams through a trusted-access program. No model variants, context window specifications, or commercial pricing have been published. No updates have occurred since its April 16, 2026 launch.

tools.name: MangroveGS
tools.shortDesc: AI system that predicts cancer metastasis risk from gene expression patterns with 80% accuracy.
tools.fullDesc: <cite index="1-4">MangroveGS studies complex gene activity patterns to calculate the chances of a tumour spreading to other parts of the body.</cite> <cite index="2-7">The tool points toward more precise care: sparing low-risk patients from aggressive therapies while making sure high-risk patients are monitored and treated more intensively.</cite> <cite index="2-11,2-12">Currently, MangroveGS is a research tool, not a standard clinical test, and the Geneva team's findings will need to be confirmed in larger groups of patients and across more cancer types.</cite>

info.label: Type
info.value: Machine Learning Model for Cancer Prediction

info.label: Best for
info.value: Cancer metastasis risk prediction and personalized treatment planning

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Research tool (Academic use)

features: <cite index="2-19">Exploits dozens, even hundreds, of gene signatures simultaneously.</cite>
<cite index="2-21">Achieves nearly 80% accuracy in predicting whether colon cancer would metastasize or recur.</cite>
<cite index="1-13">Gene signatures identified in colon cancer can help predict the risk of metastasis in stomach, lung, and breast cancers.</cite>
<cite index="6-10">Processes RNA sequencing data from tumor samples and provides a metastasis risk score through a secure platform.</cite>
<cite index="1-11">Designed to remain effective even if there are changes in the genes.</cite>
<cite index="1-15">Doctors only need access to the tumour tissue sample to analyse gene activity and calculate metastasis risk.</cite>
<cite index="2-14">Gene signatures could point scientists toward new drug targets—genes or pathways that, if blocked, might prevent cancer cells from spreading.</cite>

vi.shortDesc: Hệ thống AI dự đoán nguy cơ di căn ung thư từ các mẫu biểu hiện gen với độ chính xác 80%.
vi.fullDesc: <cite index="1-4">MangroveGS nghiên cứu các mẫu hoạt động gen phức tạp để tính toán khả năng một khối u lan sang các bộ phận khác của cơ thể.</cite> <cite index="2-7">Công cụ này hướng tới chăm sóc chính xác hơn: tránh những liệu pháp tấn công mạnh đối với bệnh nhân nguy cơ thấp trong khi đảm bảo bệnh nhân nguy cơ cao được theo dõi và điều trị chuyên sâu hơn.</cite> <cite index="2-11,2-12">Hiện tại, MangroveGS là một công cụ nghiên cứu, không phải là một xét nghiệm lâm sàng tiêu chuẩn, và những phát hiện của nhóm Geneva sẽ cần được xác nhận trên các nhóm bệnh nhân lớn hơn và trên nhiều loại ung thư khác.</cite>

zh.shortDesc: AI系统可根据基因表达模式预测癌症转移风险，准确率达80%。
zh.fullDesc: <cite index="1-4">MangroveGS研究复杂的基���活动模式，以计算肿瘤扩散到身体其他部位的可能性。</cite> <cite index="2-7">该工具有助于提供更精准的治疗方案：使低风险患者避免接受侵袭性治疗，同时确保高风险患者得到更加密集的监测和治疗。</cite> <cite index="2-11,2-12">目前，MangroveGS是一个研究工具而非标准临床检测，日内瓦研究团队的研究成果需要在更大规模患者群体和更多癌症类型中得到验证。</cite>

tools.name: Gemma 4
tools.shortDesc: Google's most capable open-source LLM family with native multimodal support and advanced reasoning for edge-to-enterprise deployment.
tools.fullDesc: Gemma 4 is Google DeepMind's most intelligent open model family, built from Gemini 3 research. Available in four sizes (E2B, E4B, 26B MoE, 31B Dense), it delivers frontier-level reasoning and agentic capabilities with native support for text, images, video, and audio. Designed for developers building privacy-first applications, on-device AI agents, and enterprise workflows requiring complete data sovereignty.

info.label: Models
info.value: Gemma 4 comes in 5 sizes: E2B (2.3B effective), E4B (4.5B effective), 12B Unified (multimodal), 26B A4B (MoE with 3.8B active), 31B Dense

info.label: Context
info.value: 256K token context window (262K in some configurations)

info.label: Pricing
info.value: 26B A4B: $0.06/M input, $0.33/M output; 31B: $0.12/M input, $0.35/M output; E4B: $0.20/M input, $0.20/M output; Open-source models available free to self-host

features: Four model sizes (E2B 2B, E4B 4B, 26B MoE with 3.8B active, 31B Dense) optimized for devices to servers
Native multimodal input: text, images (variable resolution), video, audio on small models
Built-in reasoning with configurable thinking modes for step-by-step problem solving
Native function calling and structured output support for autonomous agents

tools.name: Cohere Transcribe
tools.shortDesc: <cite index="1-2">Open-weights Conformer ASR model converting speech audio into text across 14 supported languages.</cite>
tools.fullDesc: <cite index="14-3,14-4">Cohere Transcribe is the latest standard for English speech recognition accuracy, leading the HuggingFace Open ASR Leaderboard with an average word error rate of just 5.42%.</cite> <cite index="1-5">Transcribe converts your business' audio data into precise text for search, analytics, and automation.</cite> <cite index="4-3">This dedicated transcription model was trained from scratch to support 14 enterprise-critical languages, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy while maintaining high efficiency, with an offline throughput three times higher than similarly sized competitors.</cite>

info.label: Type
info.value: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) Model

info.label: Released
info.value: March 2026

info.label: Best for
info.value: Meeting transcription, call center analytics, speech analytics, voice-enabled applications

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free API access with rate limits; Model Vault for production deployment with custom pricing

features: <cite index="4-31">Supports 14 languages: English, German, French, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, Greek, Dutch, Polish, Arabic, Vietnamese, Chinese (Mandarin), Japanese and Korean.</cite>

<cite index="13-4">Ranks #1 on the English ASR leaderboard as of March 2026, achieving a 5.42 average Word Error Rate (WER) across 8 benchmarks — while running at 524x real-time speed (RTFx), roughly 3x faster than comparable models.</cite>
<cite index="20-2">Automatic processing of long audio files; audio files longer than 35 seconds are automatically segmented into overlapping segments and reassembled.</cite>

<cite index="15-10,15-11,15-12">Built on a speech-optimized Conformer architecture; input audio waveforms are converted into a mel-spectrogram and processed by a Conformer encoder that holds the majority of the model's parameters, with representations passed to a lightweight Transformer decoder that generates text tokens.</cite>
<cite index="4-2">Released as a 2B-parameter model open-sourced on huggingface under an Apache 2.0 licence.</cite>
<cite index="1-24,1-27,1-28">Available for local deployment or edge environments, with Model Vault enabling low-latency, private cloud inference without having to manage infrastructure.</cite>

<cite index="19-12">In human evaluation on English transcription, achieved a 61% average win rate across criteria including meaning preservation, hallucination prevention, and named entity recognition.</cite>
<cite index="12-10,12-13">Customizable punctuation in the prompt at inference time, with default punctuation of all transcripts.</cite>

demo.title: Install Dependencies
demo.desc: Set up the required Python packages for running Cohere Transcribe locally
demo.code: pip install transformers>=5.4.0 torch huggingface_hub soundfile librosa sentencepiece protobuf

demo.title: Load Model and Processor
demo.desc: Initialize the Cohere Transcribe model and audio processor from Hugging Face
demo.code:
from transformers import AutoProcessor, CohereAsrForConditionalGeneration
processor = AutoProcessor.from_pretrained('CohereLabs/cohere-transcribe-03-2026')
model = CohereAsrForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained('CohereLabs/cohere-transcribe-03-2026', device_map='auto')

demo.title: Process Audio and Transcribe
demo.desc: Load audio file, prepare inputs, and generate transcription
demo.code:
from transformers.audio_utils import load_audio
audio = load_audio('path/to/audio.wav', sampling_rate=16000)
inputs = processor(audio, sampling_rate=16000, return_tensors='pt', language='en')
outputs = model.generate(**inputs, max_new_tokens=256)
text = processor.decode(outputs, skip_special_tokens=True)

vi.fullDesc: <cite index="14-3,14-4">Cohere Transcribe là tiêu chuẩn mới nhất cho độ chính xác nhận dạng tiếng Anh, dẫn đầu Bảng xếp hạng ASR mở HuggingFace với tỷ lệ lỗi từ trung bình chỉ 5,42%.</cite> <cite index="1-5">Transcribe chuyển đổi dữ liệu âm thanh của doanh nghiệp bạn thành văn bản chính xác để tìm kiếm, phân tích và tự động hóa.</cite> <cite index="4-3">Mô hình sao chép dành riêng này được huấn luyện từ đầu để hỗ trợ 14 ngôn ngữ quan trọng cho doanh nghiệp, đạt được độ chính xác tối tân trong khi duy trì hiệu suất cao, với thông lượng ngoại tuyến cao gấp ba lần các đối thủ cùng kích thước.</cite>

zh.shortDesc: <cite index="1-2">开放权重 Conformer ASR 模型，支持 14 种语言的语音音频转文本。</cite>
zh.fullDesc: <cite index="14-3,14-4">Cohere Transcribe 是英文语音识别精度的最新标准，在 HuggingFace 开放 ASR 排行榜中领先，平均字错率仅为 5.42%。</cite> <cite index="1-5">Transcribe 将您企业的音频数据转换为精确文本，用于搜索、分析和自动化。</cite> <cite index="4-3">这款专用转录模型从零开始训练，支持 14 种企业关键语言，在保持高效率的同时实现了最先进的精度，离线吞吐量是同等规模竞争对手的三倍。</cite>

It provides agents with distinct identities and granular access controls while integrating with Cloudflare Workers, Workers VPC, and the Agents SDK for end-to-end lifecycle management.

tools.name: Mercury 2
tools.shortDesc: World's fastest reasoning LLM using diffusion-based architecture for 5x faster inference.

Built for production AI workloads including agent loops, real-time voice, search systems, and coding assistants where latency is critical. Offers 128K context window, native tool use, and structured JSON output at a fraction of the cost of competing models.

Diffusion-based architecture for 5x faster reasoning than competing speed-optimized models
128K token context window supporting extended conversations and documents
Native tool use and schema-aligned JSON output for structured agent orchestration

OpenAI API compatible for seamless integration into existing workflows

vi.shortDesc: LLM suy luận nhanh nhất thế giới sử dụng kiến trúc khuếch tán để suy luận 5x nhanh hơn.

Được xây dựng cho các khối lượng công việc AI sản xuất bao gồm vòng lặp tác nhân, giọng nói thực tế, hệ thống tìm kiếm và trợ lý mã hóa nơi độ trễ là rất quan trọng. Cung cấp cửa sổ ngữ cảnh 128K, sử dụng công cụ gốc và đầu ra JSON có cấu trúc với chi phí chỉ là một phần của các mô hình cạnh tranh.

zh.shortDesc: 世界上最快的推理大语言模型，采用扩散架构实现5倍推理速度提升。
zh.fullDesc: Mercury 2 是一个基于扩散的推理语言模型，它并行生成多个令牌而非顺序生成，实现每秒超过1,000个令牌的速度。为包括代理循环、实时语音、搜索系统和代码助手等生产级AI工作负载而构建，这些应用中延迟至关重要。提供128K上下文窗口、原生工具使用和结构化JSON输出，成本仅为竞争模型的一小部分。

tools.name: Perplexity Comet Browser
tools.shortDesc: AI-native Chromium browser with built-in assistant for intelligent browsing and task automation.
tools.fullDesc: Perplexity Comet is an agentic AI browser that integrates search, summarization, and automation directly into the browsing experience. Built on Chromium and powered by Perplexity's AI engine, it allows users to search naturally, summarize content, manage tasks, and automate workflows across tabs without switching apps. Designed for professionals and knowledge workers seeking a more intelligent, productive browsing experience.

Natural language search and conversational interface for full questions without Boolean logic
Cross-tab context awareness to synthesize information from multiple open pages
Built-in automation for form filling, scheduling, shopping, and email management
Chrome extension compatibility and easy data import from Chrome

Cited answers from real-time sources matching Perplexity's search engine results

Được xây dựng trên nền Chromium và được hỗ trợ bởi công cụ AI của Perplexity, nó cho phép người dùng tìm kiếm một cách tự nhiên, tóm tắt nội dung, quản lý tác vụ và tự động hóa quy trình công việc trên các tab mà không cần chuyển ứng dụng. Được thiết kế cho các chuyên gia và nhân viên kiến thức muốn có trải nghiệm duyệt web thông minh và hiệu quả hơn.

zh.shortDesc: 具有内置助手的AI原生Chromium浏览器，提供智能浏览和任务自动化。
zh.fullDesc: Perplexity Comet是一款代理AI浏览器，将搜索、总结和自动化功能直接集成到浏览体验中。基于Chromium构建，由Perplexity的AI引擎驱动，它允���用户自然搜索、总结内容、管理任务和跨标签页自动化工作流程，无需切换应用。专为寻求更智能、更高效浏览体验的专业人士和知识工作者而设计。

tools.name: Orkes Conductor
tools.shortDesc: Enterprise workflow orchestration platform for distributed systems and AI agents at scale.
tools.fullDesc: Orkes Conductor is an enterprise-grade orchestration platform built on Netflix's open-source Conductor. It enables teams to build, deploy, and manage complex distributed workflows and AI agents with built-in reliability, observability, and security. Designed for enterprises managing mission-critical workflows across microservices, APIs, and generative AI systems.

info.value: Workflow Orchestration & AI Agent Runtime

info.label: Best for
info.value: Enterprise teams building distributed workflows, AI agents, and microservices orchestration

features: Visual workflow builder with drag-and-drop interface for designing complex workflows without coding
Native agentic orchestration with LLM integration, prompt templates, and vector database support
Multi-language support for workers (Java, Python, Go, JavaScript, etc.) deployed anywhere
Built-in system tasks for HTTP, events, AI inference, database operations, and human-in-the-loop workflows
Declarative operators (Switch, Fork/Join, Do While loops) for control flow without imperative code
Enterprise security with SOC 2 Type II certification, SSO, RBAC, and secret variable management
High-availability execution with fault tolerance, automatic retries, and canary/A-B testing capabilities
Flexible deployment: Orkes Cloud, customer-hosted in your cloud account, or Docker-based local development

Được thiết kế cho các doanh nghiệp quản lý các quy trình công việc quan trọng trên các microservices, APIs và hệ thống AI tạo sinh.

Designed for enterprise developers, these models emphasize speed, cost-efficiency, and integration with Microsoft Foundry and Azure services.

tools.name: Granola
tools.shortDesc: Bot-free AI notepad that transcribes meetings and enhances your notes without visible participants.
tools.fullDesc: Granola is a privacy-first meeting notepad that captures device audio directly without joining calls as a bot. You jot notes during meetings, and Granola's AI enhances them with structured summaries, action items, and decisions. It's designed for professionals who want natural conversations without visible recording bots altering meeting dynamics.

features: Bot-free device audio capture with no visible participant joining calls
Human-AI hybrid approach: you take notes, AI enhances with context from transcript
AI-powered Recipes for generating PRDs, coaching feedback, and follow-up emails

Bạn ghi chú trong cuộc họp, và AI của Granola sẽ cải thiện chúng bằng cách tổng hợp có cấu trúc, các mục hành động và quyết định. Nó được thiết kế cho các chuyên gia muốn có những cuộc trò chuyện tự nhiên mà không có bot ghi âm hiển thị làm thay đổi động lực cuộc họp.

tools.name: Gumloop
tools.shortDesc: AI-native automation platform for building complex workflows without coding.
tools.fullDesc: Gumloop is an AI-powered workflow automation platform that lets teams build intelligent agents and complex automations using a visual, drag-and-drop interface. It combines traditional automation with built-in AI models like GPT-4, Claude, and Gemini to enable businesses of all sizes—from solopreneurs to enterprises like Shopify and Instacart—to automate repetitive tasks, data processing, and decision-making workflows without writing code.

info.label: Released
info.value: Founded 2023, Y Combinator-backed

Built-in access to AI models (GPT-4, Claude, Gemini) without requiring personal API keys
AI-driven decision making and conditional logic within automation flows
Web scraping and browser automation via Chrome extension for data extraction
Team collaboration with role-based access control, audit logs, and permission management
Slack, Teams, and email integration for agent interaction like co-workers
Credit-based pricing for flexible scaling of AI processing and automation volume
SOC 2 Type II and GDPR compliance with zero-data retention agreements for third-party AI models

tools.shortDesc: 24/7 AI voice agents for home services that answer calls and book jobs automatically.
tools.fullDesc: Avoca is an AI-powered communications platform purpose-built for service businesses including HVAC, plumbing, and electrical companies. It handles inbound calls, appointment scheduling, outbound campaigns, and customer follow-ups through conversational AI agents that integrate directly with CRM systems like ServiceTitan. Designed for SMBs facing the challenge of missed calls and high CSR turnover.

info.label: Models
info.value: Avoca operates as three integrated pillars: Convert (inbound AI voice/calls 24/7), Nurture (outbound drip campaigns and speed-to-lead), and Coach (call scoring and auto-training)

info.label: Context
info.value: Avoca is an AI workforce platform for home service businesses (HVAC, plumbing, electrical). It handles inbound calls, texts, chats, and email; books jobs into CRMs like ServiceTitan; and provides CSR team coaching. No discrete model versions are publicly released—it's a continuously updated SaaS platform

info.label: Released
info.value: Founded 2022. Series B funding announced April 27, 2026 at $1B valuation. Most recent public status update May 2026

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Not publicly available. Sales-quoted only, typically $1,000-$3,000/month based on call volume and operator size. Requires sales demo; no public pricing page or free trial

features: 24/7 AI voice agent answers calls within seconds and books jobs directly into CRM systems
Inbound lead capture with instant responses, often within 30 seconds of submission
Outbound campaign automation that intelligently scales based on technician capacity and scheduling
Real-time call coaching and AI-powered summaries for agent training and performance improvement
Native CRM integrations with ServiceTitan, Nexstar, and Clover for seamless workflow
Multi-channel outreach including voice, SMS, email, and chat across the customer journey
Estimate follow-up automation that revives dormant quotes and re-engages past customers
Advanced analytics and real-time performance metrics with actionable insights dashboard

Nó xử lý các cuộc gọi đến, lên lịch cuộc hẹn, các chiến dịch gửi đi và theo dõi khách hàng thông qua các tác nhân AI hội thoại tích hợp trực tiếp với các hệ thống CRM như ServiceTitan. tools.name: Genesis AI (GENE-26.5)
tools.shortDesc: Foundation model enabling general-purpose robots to perform human-level physical manipulation tasks.
tools.fullDesc: GENE-26.5 is a robotic foundation model paired with human-scale dexterous robotic hands and a proprietary data engine to enable robots to perform complex, long-horizon physical tasks with human-level dexterity. The full-stack system combines advanced AI with custom hardware and data collection gloves to overcome the robotics data bottleneck, enabling applications in cooking, lab automation, wire harnessing, and other precision work.

Advanced AI foundation model absorbing massive amounts of data and environmental variations for generalization
Proprietary data engine with sensor-equipped glove enabling 100x cheaper data collection than traditional methods
High-fidelity simulation system running 430,000x faster than real-time for rapid model iteration

vi.shortDesc: Mô hình nền tảng cho phép robot đa năng thực hiện các tác vụ thao tác vật lý ở mức con người.
vi.fullDesc: GENE-26.5 là một mô hình nền tảng robot kết hợp với các bàn tay robot khéo léo quy mô con người và một công cụ dữ liệu độc quyền, cho phép robot thực hiện các tác vụ vật lý phức tạp, lâu dài với khéo léo ở mức con người. tools.name: AlphaEvolve
tools.shortDesc: Gemini-powered coding agent that autonomously discovers and optimizes complex algorithms.
tools.fullDesc: AlphaEvolve is a Gemini-powered evolutionary algorithm agent that iteratively discovers optimized algorithms for complex problems. It combines large language models with automated evaluation and evolutionary frameworks to generate, test, and refine code solutions. Available through Google Cloud's Early Access Program for solving domain-specific optimization challenges in data centers, drug discovery, chip design, and mathematical research.

info.label: Models
info.value: AlphaEvolve is not a versioned model product. It uses Gemini Flash (for breadth) and Gemini Pro (for depth) as underlying components

info.label: Context
info.value: Private preview access through Google Cloud; pricing not publicly disclosed

info.label: Released
info.value: Initial announcement May 2025; Production impact update May 7, 2026

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Not publicly available - currently in private preview/early access program

features: Ensemble LLM architecture using Gemini Flash for breadth and Gemini Pro for depth of exploration
Evolutionary algorithm framework that iteratively mutates, evaluates, and selects optimal code solutions
Automated verification system that tests changes against user-defined evaluation functions
Hardware-level optimization capability including Verilog circuit rewrites and GPU kernel improvements
Multi-domain applicability across mathematics, physics, biology, and infrastructure optimization
State-of-the-art performance on open problems including 75% success rate on 50+ mathematical challenges
Infrastructure integration with data center scheduling, TPU design, and AI model training optimization
Collaborative human-AI interface for expert-guided algorithm discovery

vi.shortDesc: Tác nhân lập trình do Gemini hỗ trợ tự động khám phá và tối ưu hóa các thuật toán phức tạp.
vi.fullDesc: AlphaEvolve là một tác nhân thuật toán tiến hóa do Gemini hỗ trợ, liên tục khám phá các thuật toán được tối ưu hóa cho các bài toán phức tạp. Khả dụng thông qua Chương trình Truy cập Sớm của Google Cloud để giải quyết các thách thức tối ưu hóa theo lĩnh vực trong các trung tâm dữ liệu, khám phá thuốc, thiết kế chip và nghiên cứu toán học.

tools.name: Kimi Code K2.6
tools.shortDesc: Open-source multimodal AI model for coding, design, and autonomous agent orchestration.
tools.fullDesc: Kimi Code K2.6 is Moonshot AI's next-generation open-weight model designed for long-horizon coding, coding-driven UI/UX generation, and multi-agent orchestration. It handles complex end-to-end coding tasks across Python, Rust, and Go, and can convert prompts and visual inputs into production-ready interfaces with agent swarm architecture scaling to hundreds of parallel sub-agents.

info.label: Models
info.value: <cite index="4-23">Kimi K2.6 was released on April 20, 2026</cite>. <cite index="12-1,12-2">Kimi K2.7 Code is a code-optimized variant released in June 2026</cite>, making it the latest model in the Kimi lineup.

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="2-2">262,144 token context window, maximum output of 262,144 tokens</cite>

info.label: Released
info.value: <cite index="5-1">Kimi K2.6 was released on April 20, 2026</cite>. <cite index="12-1">Kimi K2.7 Code was released on June 12, 2026</cite>.

info.label: Pricing
info.value: <cite index="5-1">K2.6 is priced at $0.60 input / $2.50 output per million tokens on the official API</cite>. <cite index="12-4">K2.7 Code has cached input token pricing of $0.19 per M tokens</cite>, with pricing varying by provider.

features: Native multimodal support for text, images, and video input with thinking and non-thinking modes
256K token context window enabling long-context coding and document analysis
Agent swarm architecture supporting up to 300 parallel coordinated sub-agents for autonomous task decomposition
End-to-end full-stack coding across Python, Rust, and Go with debugging and refactoring capabilities
Visual code generation transforming design mockups and prompts into production-ready interfaces
Multi-step tool calling with 300+ parallel tool execution for complex workflows
OpenAI and Anthropic-compatible API for seamless integration
Open-weight model available for self-hosting via vLLM, SGLang, and KTransformers

vi.shortDesc: Nền tảng nghiên cứu được hỗ trợ bởi AI tự động hóa các cuộc phỏng vấn khách hàng và cung cấp insights trong vài giờ.
vi.fullDesc: Listen Labs là nền tảng nghiên cứu khách hàng do AI điều khiển, thực hiện các cuộc phỏng vấn được cá nhân hóa quy mô lớn, thay thế các cuộc khảo sát truyền thống và nhóm tập trung. Nền tảng tự động tuyển dụng người tham gia, điều phối các cuộc trò chuyện AI, phân tích phản hồi và tạo báo cáo sẵn sàng cho các nhà quản lý với insights, personas và chủ đề—tất cả trong vài giờ thay vì vài tuần.

zh.shortDesc: AI驱动的研究平台，可自动化客户访谈流程，在数小时内提供洞察。
zh.fullDesc: Listen Labs是一个AI驱动的客户研究平台，可大规模进行个性化访谈，取代传统调查和焦点小组。该平台可自动招募参与者、主持AI对话、分析反馈，并生成包含洞察、用户画像和主题的高管就绪型报告——所有这些只需数小时而非数周。

tools.name: NVIDIA Ising
tools.shortDesc: Open-source AI models for quantum processor calibration and error correction.
tools.fullDesc: NVIDIA Ising is the world's first family of open-source AI models designed to solve quantum computing's two biggest bottlenecks: processor calibration and error correction. It includes vision language models and 3D CNN architectures that reduce calibration time from days to hours and deliver 2.5x faster and 3x more accurate error correction than traditional approaches. Built for researchers and enterprises, it integrates seamlessly with NVIDIA's quantum software and hardware ecosystem.

info.label: Type
info.value: Open-source AI Model Family

info.label: Released
info.value: April 2026

info.label: Best for
info.value: Quantum processor developers, researchers, and enterprises

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free (Apache-2.0 open source license)

features: Ising Calibration: 35B parameter vision-language model for automating quantum processor tuning with agentic workflows
Ising Decoding: Dual 3D CNN variants optimized for speed or accuracy in real-time quantum error correction
Pre-trained models available with fine-tuning frameworks and deployment workflows
2.5x faster performance and 3x higher accuracy compared to pyMatching and traditional decoders
Integrated with CUDA-Q for hybrid quantum-classical computing and NVQLink for QPU-GPU interconnection
Local deployment capability protecting proprietary quantum data and supporting on-site customization
Comprehensive toolkit including training data, workflow cookbook, and NIM microservices
Outperforms Gemini 3.1 Pro, Claude Opus 4.6, and GPT 5.4 on QCalEval quantum calibration benchmark

demo.title: Access NVIDIA Ising Models
demo.desc: Models are available on GitHub, Hugging Face, and build.nvidia.com for immediate deployment and fine-tuning.
demo.code: git clone https://github.com/NVIDIA/Ising && cd Ising

demo.title: Deploy with NIM Microservices
demo.desc: Use NVIDIA NIM microservices to integrate Ising into your quantum infrastructure with minimal setup.
demo.code: nvidia-nim --model ising-calibration-1

demo.title: Fine-tune for Your Hardware
demo.desc: Customize Ising models for your specific quantum processor noise models and characteristics using provided frameworks.
demo.code: python fine_tune.py --model ising-decoding --dataset your_qpu_data

prompts.label: Quantum Calibration
prompts.text: Interpret quantum processor measurement data and recommend optimal calibration parameters to achieve target performance specifications within acceptable operating ranges.

prompts.label: Error Correction
prompts.text: Process quantum error syndromes in real-time to determine optimal correction actions that minimize logical error rates while maintaining low latency for continuous quantum operation.

prompts.label: Hardware Optimization
prompts.text: Analyze QPU experimental results across multiple qubit types including superconducting qubits, ion traps, neutral atoms, quantum dots, and improve system performance through adaptive calibration.

pricing.note: NVIDIA Ising is released as open-source software under the Apache 2.0 license at no cost, making it accessible to quantum researchers and enterprises globally.

plans.name: Open Source
features: Full access to Ising Calibration and Ising Decoding models
Pre-trained model weights and training frameworks
GitHub, Hugging Face, and build.nvidia.com hosting

vi.shortDesc: Các mô hình AI mã nguồn mở để hiệu chỉnh bộ xử lý lượng tử và sửa lỗi.
vi.fullDesc: NVIDIA Ising là dòng mô hình AI mã nguồn mở đầu tiên trên thế giới được thiết kế để giải quyết hai tập trung lớn nhất của điện toán lượng tử: hiệu chỉnh bộ xử lý và sửa lỗi. Nó bao gồm các mô hình ngôn ngữ hình ảnh và kiến trúc CNN 3D giúp giảm thời gian hiệu chỉnh từ nhiều ngày xuống vài giờ và cung cấp khả năng sửa lỗi nhanh hơn 2,5 lần và chính xác hơn 3 lần so với các phương pháp truyền thống. Được xây dựng cho các nhà nghiên cứu và doanh nghiệp, nó tích hợp liền mạch với hệ sinh thái phần mềm và phần cứng lượng tử của NVIDIA.

zh.shortDesc: 用于量子处理器校准和纠错的开源AI模型。
zh.fullDesc: NVIDIA Ising是全球首个开源AI模型系列，专门设计用于解决量子计算的两大瓶颈：处理器校准和纠错。它包含视觉语言模型和3D CNN架构，可将校准时间从数天缩短至数小时，并提供比传统方法快2.5倍、精度高3倍的纠错性能。该产品为研究人员和企业而构建，与NVIDIA的量子软硬件生态系统无缝集成。

tools.name: Ineffable Intelligence
tools.shortDesc: AI research lab building superintelligent systems through reinforcement learning without human data.
tools.fullDesc: Ineffable Intelligence is an ambitious AI research lab founded by David Silver, the AlphaGo architect and former head of DeepMind's reinforcement learning team. The company develops 'superlearner' AI systems that discover knowledge and solve complex problems through experience-based learning rather than relying on human-generated data. Their technology aims to create the next generation of intelligent agents capable of breakthroughs in science, medicine, engineering and beyond.

info.label: Models
info.value: No public product released. Company is developing a 'superlearner' system using reinforcement learning; still in research phase with expected first public capability demonstration by Q2 2027.

info.label: Context
info.value: Founded late 2025 by David Silver (AlphaGo architect). Building AI systems that learn from experience rather than human data using reinforcement learning approach.

info.label: Released
info.value: No released models. Company emerged from stealth April 27, 2026 with $1.1B seed funding round at $5.1B valuation. Enterprise-only go-to-market planned; currently focused entirely on research.

info.label: Pricing
info.value: No pricing announced. When eventually released, expected to be marketed at premium pricing through B2B subscription-based arrangements and strategic partnerships; pricing plans not yet disclosed.

features: Reinforcement learning agents that learn from experience rather than human data
Pure self-discovery capability enabling autonomous knowledge generation
Agent-based architecture for learning directly from environmental interaction
Infrastructure built on trial-and-error learning mechanisms
Partnership with NVIDIA for scaled reinforcement learning infrastructure
Focus on novel problem-solving in engineering, biology and logistics
Continuous learning systems that improve over time through experience
Approach to artificial general intelligence without replicating human biases

demo.title: Experience-Based Learning
demo.desc: Ineffable's superlearner trains through interaction with its environment, testing ideas and improving solutions autonomously without requiring human-labeled datasets.

demo.title: Reinforcement Learning Loop
demo.desc: The system receives feedback from successes and failures, continuously refining its approach to discover new solutions and generate novel knowledge.

demo.title: Enterprise Applications
demo.desc: Deployed for specialized problem-solving in complex domains where human data is unavailable or insufficient, such as novel engineering challenges.

prompts.text: Design an autonomous agent to discover solutions for unsolved engineering problems through pure reinforcement learning experience.

prompts.label: Scientific Innovation
prompts.text: Develop a superlearner system that generates new hypotheses and insights in biology or chemistry without human training data.

prompts.label: Complex Optimization
prompts.text: Create an autonomous learning system for logistics optimization that discovers novel solutions through continuous environmental interaction.

pricing.note: Ineffable Intelligence is a research-stage company developing frontier AI technology. Pricing is not publicly disclosed and likely available only for enterprise partnerships and collaborations.

features: Access to proprietary reinforcement learning superlearner
Dedicated infrastructure support with NVIDIA collaboration
Custom model development for specialized applications

vi.shortDesc: Phòng lab nghiên cứu AI xây dựng các hệ thống siêu trí tuệ thông qua học tăng cường mà không cần dữ liệu từ con người.
vi.fullDesc: Ineffable Intelligence là một phòng lab nghiên cứu AI野心勃勃được thành lập bởi David Silver, kiến trúc sư của AlphaGo và cựu trưởng nhóm học tăng cường của DeepMind. Công ty phát triển các hệ thống AI 'siêu học' khám phá kiến thức và giải quyết các vấn đề phức tạp thông qua học dựa trên kinh nghiệm thay vì dựa vào dữ liệu do con người tạo ra. Công nghệ của họ nhằm tạo ra thế hệ tiếp theo của các tác nhân thông minh có khả năng đạt được những bước đột phá trong khoa học, y học, kỹ thuật và hơn thế nữa.

zh.shortDesc: 人工智能研究实验室，通过强化学习构建超级智能系统，无需人类数据。
zh.fullDesc: Ineffable Intelligence 是一家雄心勃勃的人工智能研究实验室，由 AlphaGo 的架构师、DeepMind 强化学习团队前负责人 David Silver 创立。该公司开发'超级学习者'人工智能系统，通过基于经验的学习发现知识和解决复杂问题，而不是依赖人类生成的数据。他们的技术旨在创造下一代智能代理，能够在科学、医学、工程等领域实现突破。

tools.name: Accio Work
tools.priceLabel: Free with paid plans for advanced features
tools.shortDesc: Plug-and-play enterprise AI agent platform for SMEs to automate sourcing, compliance, and global commerce operations.
tools.fullDesc: Accio Work is a no-code enterprise AI agent platform by Alibaba International, launched in March 2026, that deploys specialized teams of autonomous agents to handle end-to-end business operations. It enables SMEs and solo founders to automate compliance across 100+ markets, conduct supplier negotiations, manage marketing campaigns, and coordinate logistics without requiring technical setup or coding expertise.

info.label: Models
info.value: Accio Work supports multiple AI models including Gemini, GPT-4o, Claude, and Qwen models - assignable per agent

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="4-17">Launched on March 24, 2026, by Alibaba International Digital Commerce Group (AIDC)</cite>. <cite index="12-2">One month after its public debut, Accio Work has recorded over 230,000 businesses worldwide who have successfully deployed autonomous "Agentic Business Teams" to manage their e-commerce operations</cite>. <cite index="13-1,13-2">On June 18, 2026, Alibaba.com announced the official launch of 'Accio Work,' an agentic AI business team designed for SMEs in Malaysia</cite>.

info.label: Released
info.value: <cite index="4-17">March 24, 2026</cite>

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Two pricing models reported: <cite index="1-1">Core platform costs around $45 per month, or roughly $539 if you pay annually</cite>. Alternatively, <cite index="10-1,10-2,10-3,10-4">as of June 2026, pricing includes a Free tier, Basic tier at $10/month for small teams, and Pro tier at $25/month for unlimited usage</cite>. <cite index="2-26">Alibaba.com sellers get a 20% discount on paid plans, and some features bundle automatically with existing Gold Supplier memberships</cite>.

features: Multi-agent orchestration assembles specialized teams that work in parallel on complex business tasks
Automated compliance handling for VAT filing, tax refunds, and customs documentation across 100+ markets
Autonomous supplier negotiation and RFQ generation with real-time supplier matching
Local-first architecture keeps sensitive data on your device while routing LLM requests through secure gateways
Support for multiple LLMs including Gemini, GPT-4o, Claude, and Qwen with per-agent model selection
Skills marketplace to create, install, and share reusable agent capabilities for specific workflows
Messaging platform integration with Telegram, Discord, WeChat, DingTalk, and Lark for direct communication
Scheduled automations for recurring tasks with cron-like natural language or UI-based scheduling

vi.shortDesc: Nền tảng AI agent doanh nghiệp plug-and-play cho các doanh nghiệp vừa và nhỏ để tự động hóa sourcing, tuân thủ và hoạt động thương mại toàn cầu.
vi.fullDesc: Accio Work là nền tảng AI agent doanh nghiệp không cần code của Alibaba International, ra mắt vào tháng 3 năm 2026, triển khai các nhóm agent tự chủ chuyên biệt để xử lý các hoạt động kinh doanh từ đầu đến cuối. Nó cho phép các doanh nghiệp vừa và nhỏ cũng như các nhà sáng lập độc lập tự động hóa tuân thủ pháp luật trên 100+ thị trường, thực hiện đàm phán với nhà cung cấp, quản lý các chiến dịch tiếp thị và điều phối logistik mà không cần thiết lập kỹ thuật hoặc kiến thức mã hóa.

zh.shortDesc: 为中小企业提供的即插即用企业AI代理平台，用于自动化采购、合规和全球商务运营。

tools.name: Sierra
tools.company: Sierra (founded by Bret Taylor and Clay Bavor)
tools.shortDesc: Enterprise Agent OS for autonomous customer service across chat, voice, and email with action execution.
tools.fullDesc: Sierra is an Agent Operating System built for enterprises to deploy AI agents that handle customer service autonomously across multiple channels. Agents can process transactions, manage returns, update systems, and resolve issues without human intervention. The platform serves Fortune 50 companies including WeightWatchers, SiriusXM, and Sonos.

info.label: Models
info.value: Agent OS (primary platform); Agent Studio 2.0 (no-code interface); Agent Data Platform (memory/context); Ghostwriter (agent-building agent, released March 2026)

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="3-21,3-22">Agent OS enables autonomous AI agents that handle customer interactions across text, voice, email, SMS, and other channels, taking actions within business systems such as processing orders, managing subscriptions, originating mortgages, handling returns, and completing payments</cite>

info.label: Released
info.value: <cite index="10-10">Sierra launched publicly in February 2024</cite>; <cite index="3-13">Ghostwriter was released in March 2026</cite>

info.label: Pricing

features: Multi-channel deployment across chat, voice, SMS, WhatsApp, email, and ChatGPT integration
Agent Data Platform for persistent memory and personalized customer context across interactions
Agent Studio 2.0 with no-code journey builder and collaborative Workspaces for team-based development
Agent SDK with composable skills and developer tools for complex workflow automation
Constellation of 15+ AI models (OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta) routed intelligently by task complexity
PCI-DSS Level 1 payment processing and multi-factor authentication within conversations
Ghostwriter self-service agent builder using natural language, SOPs, and transcripts
Explorer analytics engine with continuous improvement recommendations and anomaly detection

tools.name: Runware
tools.shortDesc: Unified AI API for image, video, audio, and text generation at up to 90% lower cost.
tools.fullDesc: Runware is a developer-focused platform offering a single unified API for accessing 400K+ generative AI models. It powers image generation, video synthesis, audio creation, 3D generation, and LLM tasks through its proprietary Sonic Inference Engine, delivering sub-second inference speeds with transparent pay-per-use pricing. Built for startups, enterprises, and creative professionals who need fast, affordable AI media generation without complex infrastructure.

info.label: Type
info.value: AI Inference API / Multimodal Generation Platform

info.label: Best for
info.value: Developers building AI-powered products, content creators, enterprises needing high-throughput media generation

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Pay-per-use, starting at $0.0006/image; custom enterprise plans available

features: Access to 400K+ preloaded AI models including FLUX, Stable Diffusion, Kling, and custom LoRAs
Sub-second image generation and rapid video processing via Sonic Inference Engine custom hardware
Text-to-image, image-to-image, inpainting, outpainting, and ControlNet parameter control
Video generation from text or images at 62% lower cost than competitors
Audio synthesis, 3D asset generation, and LLM inference through single unified API endpoint
Commercial usage rights included for official models; upload and run custom fine-tuned models
Interactive Playground for testing models before integration with real-time cost preview
REST API and WebSocket support with consistent request/response patterns across all modalities

Lý tưởng cho những người học suốt đời, sinh viên và các chuyên gia tìm kiếm giáo dục theo yêu cầu về bất kỳ chủ đề nào.

tools.name: Parallel Web Systems
tools.shortDesc: Web search and research APIs built for AI agents with structured outputs and citations.
tools.fullDesc: Parallel Web Systems provides purpose-built web search and research APIs designed specifically for AI agents and autonomous systems. The platform enables agents to perform real-time web searches, extract structured data, and conduct deep research tasks with verifiable citations and minimal hallucinations. Built for enterprises and AI developers who need accurate, reliable web data at predictable costs.

info.label: Type
info.value: API Infrastructure

info.label: Best for
info.value: AI agents, research workflows, data enrichment, enterprise automation

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Pay-as-you-go per API call ($0.005-$10 per 1000 requests)

features: Real-time web search API returning ranked URLs with token-optimized excerpts for AI consumption
Research API for deep dives into topics with fact extraction and citations to reduce hallucinations
Data extraction API converting unstructured web content into structured JSON/CSV formats
Chat API integration for interactive chat applications with web context
Monitor API for continuous tracking of web changes and new events
MCP (Model Context Protocol) server integration with Claude Code and other AI tools
SOC2 Type II certified for enterprise security and compliance
Pre-built integrations with LangChain, AutoGPT, CrewAI, and other agent frameworks

demo.desc: Extract full page content from specific URLs and convert to structured data format for downstream processing.

demo.title: Research with Citations
demo.desc: Conduct deep research on a topic with the Task API, returning comprehensive findings with cited sources.

vi.shortDesc: API tìm kiếm web và nghiên cứu được xây dựng cho các AI agents với kết quả có cấu trúc và trích dẫn.

Nền tảng cho phép các agents thực hiện tìm kiếm web thời gian thực, trích xuất dữ liệu có cấu trúc và thực hiện các nhiệm vụ nghiên cứu sâu với trích dẫn có thể xác minh và giảm thiểu ảo giác. Được xây dựng cho các doanh nghiệp và nhà phát triển AI cần dữ liệu web chính xác, đáng tin cậy với chi phí dự đoán được.

tools.name: Palo Alto Networks Prisma AIRS 3.0
tools.shortDesc: Comprehensive AI security platform securing autonomous agents, apps, models and data end-to-end.
tools.fullDesc: <cite index="2-2">Palo Alto Networks has advanced its AI security platform with Prisma AIRS 3.0, securing the agentic AI lifecycle and enabling enterprises to move from observation to safe autonomous execution.</cite> <cite index="2-5">Prisma AIRS 3.0 closes this gap, providing visibility and securing agents from design to runtime as they execute complex tasks independently.</cite> It's designed for enterprises rapidly deploying autonomous AI systems who need comprehensive visibility and governance across cloud, SaaS, and endpoint environments.

info.label: Type
info.value: Enterprise AI Security Platform

info.label: Released
info.value: March 2026

info.label: Best for
info.value: Enterprise AI governance, agentic AI security, autonomous agent orchestration

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Enterprise (quote-based), no public free tier

features: <cite index="3-11">Organizations can now instantly inventory AI agents, models, and connections across their entire environment.</cite>

<cite index="5-27">Agent Artifact Scanning extends model scanning to agent artifacts, analyzing agent code, MCP servers, as well as skills for unsafe permissions, hidden vulnerabilities and indirect injection paths.</cite>

<cite index="5-28">Agent Red Teaming builds on AI Red Teaming with a multiagent architecture that simulates real adversaries, testing how agents behave under conditions, such as tool misuse and manipulated inputs.</cite>

<cite index="5-29">Agent Posture Management continuously assesses risk on agents operating across 12 different agentic SaaS and Cloud platforms, providing a real-time understanding of exposure as systems evolve.</cite>

<cite index="14-5">It secures your next-generation AI applications, AI models, and AI datasets from network threats such as prompt injections, sensitive data leakage, insecure output (for example, malware and URLs), and model DoS attacks.</cite>

<cite index="12-29">It prevents 30+ prompt injection and jailbreak techniques, scans for 1,000+ sensitive data patterns, discovers AI agents across cloud/SaaS/endpoints, assigns agent identities with RBAC and audit trails, runs red team simulations, and filters 8 categories of toxic content.</cite>
<cite index="14-11">AI Runtime API secures your AI applications, AI data, and AI agents by embedding Security-as-Code directly into your source code.</cite>
<cite index="5-1">Mapping enterprise agents across cloud and SaaS environments, endpoint agents (including vibe coding agents) running on developer systems and browser-based agents.</cite>

vi.fullDesc: <cite index="2-2">Palo Alto Networks đã nâng cao nền tảng bảo mật AI với Prisma AIRS 3.0, bảo vệ vòng đời AI có tác nhân và cho phép các doanh nghiệp chuyển từ quan sát đến thực thi tự trị an toàn.</cite> <cite index="2-5">Prisma AIRS 3.0 khắc phục khoảng trống này, cung cấp khả năng hiển thị và bảo vệ các tác nhân từ thiết kế đến thời gian chạy khi họ thực thi các tác vụ phức tạp một cách độc lập.</cite> Nó được thiết kế cho các doanh nghiệp triển khai nhanh chóng các hệ thống AI tự trị và cần hiển thị toàn diện cũng như quản trị trên toàn bộ môi trường đám mây, SaaS và endpoint.

zh.shortDesc: 全面的AI安全平台，从端到端保护自主智能体、应用、模型和数据。
zh.fullDesc: <cite index="2-2">Palo Alto Networks已通过Prisma AIRS 3.0升级了其AI安全平台，保护代理AI生命周期，使企业能够从观察转变为安全的自主执行。</cite> <cite index="2-5">Prisma AIRS 3.0弥补了这一差距，在智能体从设计到运行时执行复杂任务的全过程中提供可见性和安全保护。</cite> 该平台专为快速部署自主AI系统的企业设计，这些企业需要跨云、SaaS和端点环境的全面可见性和治理。

info.label: Pricing

vi.fullDesc: <cite index="13-2">Agent Studio cho phép các đội ngũ đóng gói các tập dữ liệu đáng tin cậy và logic kinh doanh thành các agent tái sử dụng trong Alteryx One</cite>. <cite index="13-1">Nó cho phép các tổ chức chuyển đổi các quy trình từ dữ liệu sang insight thành các hệ thống dựa trên agent, với MCP Server mở rộng các agent đó vào các ứng dụng doanh nghiệp như Slack và Microsoft Teams, cũng như các agent AI và LLM như Claude và OpenAI</cite>. Được xây dựng để các nhà phân tích kinh doanh có thể triển khai phân tích và tự động hóa agent theo quy mô lớn.

tools.name: Muse Spark
tools.shortDesc: Meta's frontier reasoning model with multimodal input and consumer-focused AI for health, shopping, and agentic tasks.
tools.fullDesc: Muse Spark is Meta's first model from Meta Superintelligence Labs, a natively multimodal reasoning model designed for complex problem-solving across text, images, and audio. Built from a ground-up rebuild of Meta's AI stack, it excels in health reasoning, visual understanding, and multimodal tasks while powering the Meta AI assistant across Meta's app ecosystem. The model introduces Contemplating mode for parallel multi-agent reasoning and supports tool use, visual chain-of-thought, and test-time reasoning.

Visual chain-of-thought reasoning for step-by-step image problem-solving
Contemplating mode orchestrates multiple agents in parallel for complex reasoning
Test-time reasoning—model thinks before answering using optimized reasoning tokens
Tool use and multi-agent orchestration built into core architecture
10x compute efficiency compared to Llama 4 Maverick with superior capability
Health specialization via curation with over 1,000 physicians
Integrated into Meta AI app, meta.ai website, with rollout to WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Messenger, and Ray-Ban AI glasses

vi.shortDesc: Mô hình lập luận biên giới của Meta với đầu vào đa phương thức và AI hướng tới người dùng cho sức khỏe, mua sắm và các tác vụ tự động.
vi.fullDesc: Muse Spark là mô hình đầu tiên của Meta từ Meta Superintelligence Labs, một mô hình lập luận đa phương thức được thiết kế để giải quyết các vấn đề phức tạp trên văn bản, hình ảnh và âm thanh. Được xây dựng từ việc xây dựng lại hoàn toàn ngăn xếp AI của Meta, nó xuất sắc trong lập luận sức khỏe, hiểu biết thị giác và các tác vụ đa phương thức trong khi cung cấp năng lượng cho trợ lý Meta AI trên toàn bộ hệ sinh thái ứng dụng của Meta. Mô hình giới thiệu chế độ Contemplating để lập luận đa tác nhân song song và hỗ trợ sử dụng công cụ, chuỗi suy nghĩ trực quan và lập luận tại thời điểm kiểm tra.

zh.shortDesc: Meta的前沿推理模型，具有多模态输入和面向消费者的AI，用于健康、购物和智能代理���务。
zh.fullDesc: Muse Spark是Meta来自Meta超级智能实验室的首款模型，是一个原生多模态推理模型，设计用于跨文本、图像和音频的复杂问题解决。该模型从Meta AI堆栈的彻底重建出发，在健康推理、视觉理解和多模态任务方面表现出色，同时为Meta应用生态系统中的Meta AI助手提供支持。该模型引入了用于并行多智能体推理的Contemplating模式，并支持工具使用、视觉思维链和测试时推理。

vi.fullDesc: <cite index="6-9">Gemini Spark chạy liên tục trên các máy ảo Google Cloud và thực hiện các hành động trên các ứng dụng của bạn — ngay cả khi thiết bị của bạn tắt.</cite> <cite index="5-4,5-6">Nó kết nối natively với các ứng dụng Google như Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides, YouTube và Google Maps, và có thể giúp bạn thực hiện các hành động trên toàn bộ không gian làm việc kỹ thuật số của bạn.</cite> <cite index="5-24,5-25,5-26">Được thiết kế như một tác nhân AI dễ tiếp cận cho mọi người, bạn tương tác với nó bằng cách trò chuyện thông thường, và không cần kiến thức kỹ thuật.</cite>

tools.name: WebMCP
tools.shortDesc: Web standard enabling AI agents to interact with websites through structured tools.
tools.fullDesc: WebMCP (Web Model Context Protocol) is a proposed open web standard that allows websites to expose structured, callable tools to AI agents running in the browser. Developed collaboratively by Google and Microsoft, it replaces fragile screen scraping with explicit tool contracts. Ideal for web developers building agent-ready applications and organizations deploying AI automation at scale.

info.label: Type
info.value: Web Standard / Browser API

info.label: Released
info.value: February 2026

info.label: Best for
info.value: Web developers making sites agent-ready, agentic AI deployments

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free, open standard

features: Declarative API for exposing HTML forms as structured tools without JavaScript
Imperative API using navigator.modelContext for complex, dynamic JavaScript-based interactions
Browser-native tool discovery mechanism enabling AI agents to locate available capabilities
JSON Schema definitions for explicit input/output contracts reducing agent hallucination
Permission-first security model requiring user confirmation before sensitive actions
Support for state management allowing agents to understand current page context
Chrome DevTools extension for inspecting, testing, and monitoring registered tools
Progressive enhancement capability allowing gradual adoption alongside existing websites

demo.title: Register Imperative Tool
demo.desc: Define a complex JavaScript tool with parameters and handler logic

demo.title: Declare HTML Form Tool
demo.desc: Annotate an existing HTML form to expose it as a structured tool
demo.code:
<form data-tool-name="book_flight" data-tool-description="Book a flight">
  <input name="destination" required>
  <input name="date" type="date" required>
  <button type="submit">Book</button>
</form>

demo.title: Agent Invocation
demo.desc: AI agent discovers and calls the tool with natural language
demo.code:
User: "Help me book a flight to New York tomorrow"
Agent: [detects 'book_flight' tool] → executes with {destination: 'New York', date: tomorrow}

prompts.label: Form Automation
prompts.text: I need to fill out a support ticket form with my issue description and contact information. Can you help me submit it?

prompts.label: E-commerce Workflow
prompts.text: Search for blue wireless headphones under $100, add the best option to my cart, and proceed to checkout.

prompts.label: Booking Task
prompts.text: Find available appointments for next Tuesday and book the 2 PM slot with my preferred location.

pricing.note: WebMCP is an open web standard maintained through W3C community processes. All specifications, APIs, and tooling are available free of charge. Implementation is supported by Google and Microsoft with cross-browser adoption planned.

plans.name: Free Standard
features: Full access to Declarative and Imperative APIs
DevTools extension for testing and debugging
Access to documentation and example implementations

vi.shortDesc: Tiêu chuẩn web cho phép các tác nhân AI tương tác với các trang web thông qua các công cụ có cấu trúc.
vi.fullDesc: WebMCP (Web Model Context Protocol) là một tiêu chuẩn web mở được đề xuất cho phép các trang web cung cấp các công cụ có thể gọi được, có cấu trúc cho các tác nhân AI chạy trong trình duyệt. Được phát triển hợp tác bởi Google và Microsoft, nó thay thế việc phân tích màn hình không ổn định bằng các hợp đồng công cụ rõ ràng. Lý tưởng cho các nhà phát triển web xây dựng các ứng dụng sẵn sàng cho tác nhân và các tổ chức triển khai tự động hóa AI quy mô lớn.

zh.shortDesc: 一种网络标准，使AI代理能够通过结构化工具与网站交互。
zh.fullDesc: WebMCP（Web Model Context Protocol）是一项开放网络标准提案，允许网站向在浏览器中运行的AI代理公开结构化的可调用工具。由Google和Microsoft协作开发，它用明确的工具合约取代了脆弱的屏幕抓取。非常适合构��代理就绪应用的网络开发人员和大规模部署AI自动化的组织。

tools.name: Project Glasswing
tools.shortDesc: AI-powered initiative to identify and fix critical vulnerabilities in essential software infrastructure.
tools.fullDesc: Project Glasswing is Anthropic's controlled-access program that uses Claude Mythos Preview to autonomously discover and remediate undiscovered vulnerabilities in critical software at scale. The initiative provides vetted organizations with access to advanced AI security capabilities through a structured partner program, enabling defenders to secure the world's most critical infrastructure before AI capabilities can be weaponized for attacks.

info.label: Type
info.value: AI Security Initiative

info.label: Released
info.value: April 2026

info.label: Best for
info.value: Critical infrastructure security, vulnerability research, enterprise security teams

info.label: Pricing

features: Autonomous vulnerability discovery in critical software systems and infrastructure
Advanced exploit chain creation by linking multiple vulnerabilities together
Zero-day vulnerability identification across operating systems and browsers
Support for both first-party software and open-source project scanning
Tiered access program with organizational verification and continuous monitoring
Integration with coordinated vulnerability disclosure processes
Fraud detection and financial transaction security capabilities
$4M in direct donations to open-source security organizations

vi.shortDesc: Sáng kiến được hỗ trợ bởi AI nhằm xác định và khắc phục các lỗ hổng bảo mật nghiêm trọng trong cơ sở hạ tầng phần mềm thiết yếu.
vi.fullDesc: Project Glasswing là chương trình truy cập có kiểm soát của Anthropic sử dụng Claude Mythos Preview để tự động phát hiện và khắc phục các lỗ hổng bảo mật chưa được biết đến trong phần mềm quan trọng quy mô lớn. Sáng kiến này cung cấp cho các tổ chức được xác minh quyền truy cập vào các khả năng bảo mật AI tiên tiến thông qua một chương trình đối tác có cấu trúc, giúp các nhà bảo vệ bảo mật cơ sở hạ tầng quan trọng nhất thế giới trước khi các khả năng AI có thể bị sử dụng vũ khí để tấn công.

zh.shortDesc: 由AI驱动的计划，旨在识别和修复关键软件基础设施中的严重漏洞。
zh.fullDesc: Project Glasswing是Anthropic的受控访问程序，使用Claude Mythos Preview自主发现和修复关键软件中大规模未发现的漏洞。该计划通过结构化合作伙伴计划为经审核的组织提供先进AI安全能力的访问权限，使防御者能够在AI能力被用于攻击之前保护世界上最��键的基础设施。

tools.name: SubQ (Subquadratic)
tools.shortDesc: First frontier LLM with 12M token context and linear scaling architecture.
tools.fullDesc: SubQ is the first commercial large language model built on a fully subquadratic sparse-attention architecture that scales linearly with context length instead of quadratically. With up to 12 million token context windows, it enables processing entire codebases, documents, and knowledge bases in a single pass. Built for enterprise teams and developers handling long-context reasoning, code analysis, and research workflows.

info.label: Models
info.value: SubQ 1M-Preview (production API: 1M context; research: 12M context)

info.label: Context
info.value: Up to 12 million tokens (research); 1 million tokens (production API)

info.label: Pricing
info.value: No official pricing published; estimated ~$0.50/M input tokens, ~$1.50/M output tokens (private beta, waitlist only)

features: 12M token context window with linear cost scaling (vs. quadratic for standard transformers)
Subquadratic Selective Attention (SSA) architecture for content-dependent token routing
52× faster inference than FlashAttention at 1M tokens
95% accuracy on RULER 128K benchmark at 300× lower cost than Claude Opus
Full codebase ingestion via SubQ Code CLI for multi-file analysis without agent coordination
OpenAI-compatible API with streaming and tool-use support
Free SubQ Search tool for long-context research workflows

demo.title: Process Full Codebase
demo.desc: Load entire repository into context window and analyze cross-file dependencies, refactoring patterns, and bug fixes in one pass.
demo.code: subq-code --repo ./my-project --analyze

demo.title: Long-Context Retrieval
demo.desc: Search and reason over 9+ million words (120+ books equivalent) without RAG fragmentation or chunking overhead.
demo.code: Query entire legal contracts, research corpus, or documentation without splitting

demo.title: Enterprise Knowledge Queries
demo.desc: Ingest database tables, spreadsheets, and long operational logs to find multi-hop connections and inconsistencies.
demo.code: Process full customer support history, quarterly reports, or compliance archives in single context

prompts.label: Research Synthesis
prompts.text: Across these 50 research papers, find all methodological contradictions, reconcile conflicting findings, and synthesize a unified conclusion.

pricing.note: SubQ launched in May 2026 in private beta with early access. Pricing reflects announced per-token rates; no stated subscription tiers. Free SubQ Search tool initially available to all users.

features: Linear cost scaling up to 12M tokens

changes: SubQ 1.1 Small released - second iteration of Subquadratic Sparse Attention model at smallest size
Requires 64.5x less compute than dense attention and runs 56x faster than FlashAttention-2 at 1M tokens
Model card released with near-perfect long-context retrieval up to 12M tokens
Broader model lineup ranging from 2M to 12M tokens planned for later in year

vi.shortDesc: LLM biên giới đầu tiên với ngữ cảnh 12M token và kiến trúc scaling tuyến tính.
vi.fullDesc: SubQ là mô hình ngôn ngữ lớn thương mại đầu tiên được xây dựng trên kiến trúc sparse-attention hoàn toàn subquadratic, có khả năng scaling tuyến tính theo độ dài ngữ cảnh thay vì bình phương. Với cửa sổ ngữ cảnh lên tới 12 triệu token, nó cho phép xử lý toàn bộ codebase, tài liệu và cơ sở kiến thức trong một lần. Được xây dựng cho các nhóm doanh nghiệp và nhà phát triển xử lý lý luận ngữ cảnh dài, phân tích mã và quy trình công việc nghiên cứu.

zh.shortDesc: 首个具有1200万token上下文和线性扩展架构的前沿LLM。
zh.fullDesc: SubQ是首个基于完全次二次稀疏注意力架构的商用大型语言模型，能够以线性而非二次方式随上下文长度扩展。拥有高达1200万token的上下文窗口，可以在单次处理中完成整个代码库、文档和知识库的处理。专为处理长上下文推理、代码分析和研究工作流的企业团队和开发人员而构建。

tools.name: OCI Enterprise AI
tools.shortDesc: Build and deploy production-ready AI agents with managed orchestration across enterprise data sources.
tools.fullDesc: OCI Enterprise AI is an end-to-end managed service for building, deploying, and governing AI agents in production. It provides access to leading foundation models from multiple vendors through one API, built-in orchestration tools for RAG and natural language to SQL, open standards support, and enterprise security controls for regulated environments.

info.label: Models
info.value: Multiple models including xAI Grok series (Grok 4.20, Grok 4.3), Google Gemini 2.5, OpenAI gpt-oss models, Cohere models (Command A, Embed 4, Rerank 4), NVIDIA Nemotron 3 models, and support for model import

info.label: Context
info.value: OCI Enterprise AI is an end-to-end developer platform for building, managing, and deploying production-grade AI agents with enterprise governance, security, and vector search capabilities

info.label: Released
info.value: General Availability announced March 26, 2026

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Per-token pricing varies by model ($0.05-$10.68/M tokens range). Oracle does not publish detailed public pricing; pricing is quote-based requiring direct sales engagement

features: Access to models from OpenAI, Google, Meta, Cohere, and xAI through unified API
Built-in retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) for grounded responses
Natural language to SQL conversion for structured data access
Support for LangChain, LangGraph, AutoGen, and Model Context Protocol (MCP)
Dedicated AI clusters for stable, high-throughput enterprise workloads
IAM integration, guardrails, auditability, and observability for secure deployment
OpenAI Responses API compatibility for SDK portability
Managed vector storage with semantic search and metadata filtering

demo.title: Initialize OCI Enterprise AI Agent
demo.desc: Create and configure an agent project with chosen foundation models and data sources
demo.code:
# Python SDK initialization
from oci_generative_ai import AgentAPI
agent = AgentAPI(api_key='your-enterprise-ai-key')
project = agent.create_project('my-enterprise-agent')

demo.title: Connect Data Source & Build RAG Workflow
demo.desc: Index documents and configure retrieval-augmented generation for grounded responses
demo.code:
# Add documents to vector store
vector_store = agent.create_vector_store('enterprise-docs')
vector_store.ingest_files(['doc1.pdf', 'doc2.pdf'])
workflow = agent.create_rag_workflow(vector_store)

demo.title: Define Agent Tools & Deploy
demo.desc: Set agent tools, APIs it can call, and deploy to production endpoint
demo.code:
agent.add_tool('database_query', 'nl2sql', database_connection)
agent.add_tool('email_sender', 'send_email')
deployment = agent.deploy(project, endpoint='production')

vi.shortDesc: Xây dựng và triển khai các agent AI sẵn sàng cho sản xuất với orchestration được quản lý trên các nguồn dữ liệu doanh nghiệp.
vi.fullDesc: OCI Enterprise AI là một dịch vụ được quản lý toàn diện để xây dựng, triển khai và quản trị các agent AI trong sản xuất. Nó cung cấp quyền truy cập vào các mô hình nền tảng hàng đầu từ nhiều nhà cung cấp thông qua một API, các công cụ orchestration tích hợp cho RAG và natural language to SQL, hỗ trợ tiêu chuẩn mở và các kiểm soát bảo mật doanh nghiệp cho các môi trường có quy định.

zh.shortDesc: 通过企业数据源上的托管编排，构建和部署生产就绪的AI代理。
zh.fullDesc: OCI Enterprise AI是一项端到端的托管服务，用于在生产环境中构建、部署和管理AI代理。它通过单一API提供来自多个供应商的领先基础模型的访问权限，包含用于RAG和自然语言到SQL的内置编排工具、开放标准支持，以及针对受规管环境的企业级安全控制。

changes: Added Cohere Rerank 4 for improved retrieval in enterprise AI search

tools.name: Ask YouTube
tools.priceLabel: Free for all users / Premium for early access
tools.shortDesc: AI-powered conversational search that lets you ask complex questions to find relevant videos across YouTube's catalog.
tools.fullDesc: Ask YouTube is a conversational search feature powered by Gemini that reimagines how users discover videos. Instead of typing keywords, users can ask natural language questions and receive structured responses combining long-form videos, Shorts, text summaries, and relevant video clips with timestamps. The tool supports follow-up questions to refine results and is designed for exploratory searches with context and nuance.

Jump directly to relevant timestamps within videos that answer your query
View both long-form videos and YouTube Shorts in unified search results
Ask follow-up questions to refine and narrow search results within the same session
Access real-time web information combined with YouTube's video library
See video titles, channel names, and creator details for easy navigation
Support for voice input on smart TVs and devices with microphones

vi.shortDesc: Tìm kiếm hội thoại được hỗ trợ bởi AI cho phép bạn đặt những câu hỏi phức tạp để tìm kiếm các video liên quan trên toàn bộ YouTube.
vi.fullDesc: Ask YouTube là tính năng tìm kiếm hội thoại được hỗ trợ bởi Gemini, tái tưởng tượng cách người dùng khám phá video. Thay vì gõ từ khóa, người dùng có thể đặt câu hỏi bằng ngôn ngữ tự nhiên và nhận được các phản hồi có cấu trúc kết hợp video dài, Shorts, tóm tắt văn bản và các đoạn video liên quan có dấu thời gian. Công cụ hỗ trợ các câu hỏi theo dõi để tinh chỉnh kết quả và được thiết kế cho các tìm kiếm khám phá với bối cảnh và sắc thái.

vi.shortDesc: Ứng dụng bệnh nhân do AI hỗ trợ để hiểu kết quả xét nghiệm Labcorp với các thông tin sức khỏe.
vi.fullDesc: <cite index="11-1">MyLabcorp là một ứng dụng mới được hỗ trợ bởi AI giúp bạn hiểu kết quả xét nghiệm Labcorp, theo dõi sức khỏe của bạn theo thời gian, và quản lý các cuộc hẹn và hóa đơn, tất cả ở một nơi.</cite> <cite index="13-2">Các khả năng AI của MyLabcorp được hỗ trợ một phần bởi các mô hình suy luận nâng cao của OpenAI, cho phép các tương tác hội thoại tự nhiên hơn được điều chỉnh riêng cho từng người dùng.</cite> Hoàn hảo cho các bệnh nhân tìm kiếm những giải thích rõ ràng hơn về công việc xét nghiệm và xu hướng sức khỏe của họ.

zh.shortDesc: 由AI驱动的患者应用程序，帮助理解Labcorp实验室结果并提供健康见解。
zh.fullDesc: <cite index="11-1">MyLabcorp是一款新的AI驱动应用程序，可以帮助您理解Labcorp检查结果、长期追踪健康状况，并在一个平台上管理预约和账单。</cite> <cite index="13-2">MyLabcorp的AI功能部分由OpenAI的先进推理模型提供支持，可实现更自然��更具对话性的交互，针对每个用户进行定制。</cite> 非常适合寻求更清晰实验室检查解释和健康趋势分析的患者。

tools.name: Antigravity 2.0
tools.shortDesc: Agent-first platform for autonomous AI agents to plan, code, test, and deploy full applications.
tools.fullDesc: <cite index="1-1,1-2">Antigravity 2.0 is a standalone desktop application for launching, monitoring, and orchestrating AI agents across projects, designed as a central command center for agent-first development.</cite> <cite index="7-8">Google Antigravity is an agent-first development platform for developers to take an idea and turn it into a production-ready app.</cite> <cite index="4-2">The AI is an autonomous actor capable of planning, executing, validating, and iterating on complex engineering tasks with minimal human intervention.</cite>

info.label: Models
info.value: Gemini 3.5 Flash (primary); supports Gemini Pro and other Gemini models

info.label: Context
info.value: Agent-first development platform with desktop app, CLI, SDK, and Managed Agents API. Features parallel agents, subagent workflows, scheduled background tasks, native voice support, and browser-based testing.

info.label: Released
info.value: 2.0 launched May 19, 2026 at Google I/O

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free (rate-limited); AI Pro $20/month; AI Ultra $100/month (5x limits); AI Ultra Max $200/month (20x limits, reduced from $250)

features: <cite index="7-2">Orchestrate multiple agents to execute tasks in parallel</cite>
<cite index="1-8">Scheduled Tasks with cron-style scheduling for background automation</cite>
<cite index="7-14">Dynamic subagents for parallelized workflows and ecosystem integrations across Google AI Studio, Android and Firebase</cite>
<cite index="5-27,5-28,5-29">Browser Subagent that spins up a real Chrome instance, clicks buttons, fills forms, takes screenshots, and debugs issues</cite>
<cite index="6-1">Platform includes desktop app, CLI, SDK, Managed Agents API, and enterprise deployment path</cite>
<cite index="1-7">Powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash with support for additional reasoning models where supported</cite>
<cite index="1-9,1-10">Project-scoped settings and permission grants for safer control over what each project can access</cite>
<cite index="6-43">Voice command support for hands-free operation</cite>

vi.shortDesc: Nền tảng hướng tới Agent để các agent AI tự trị lập kế hoạch, viết code, kiểm tra và triển khai các ứng dụng hoàn chỉnh.
vi.fullDesc: <cite index="1-1,1-2">Antigravity 2.0 là một ứng dụng desktop độc lập để khởi chạy, giám sát và điều phối các agent AI trên nhiều dự án, được thiết kế như một trung tâm chỉ huy cho phát triển hướng tới agent.</cite> <cite index="7-8">Google Antigravity là một nền tảng phát triển hướng tới agent giúp các nhà phát triển biến ý tưởng thành ứng dụng sẵn sàng triển khai.</cite> <cite index="4-2">AI là một diễn viên tự trị có khả năng lập kế hoạch, thực thi, xác thực và lặp lại các tác vụ kỹ thuật phức tạp với sự can thiệp của con người tối thiểu.</cite>

zh.shortDesc: 以代理为先的平台，使自主AI代理能够规划、编码、测试和部署完整应用。
zh.fullDesc: <cite index="1-1,1-2">Antigravity 2.0是一个独立的桌面应用程序，用于跨项目启动、监控和编排AI代理，设计为代理优先开发的中央控制中心。</cite> <cite index="7-8">Google Antigravity是一个以代理为先的开���平台，帮助开发者将创意转化为生产就绪的应用。</cite> <cite index="4-2">该AI是一个自主行为体，能够以最少的人类干预来规划、执行、验证和迭代复杂的工程任务。</cite>

tools.name: Rodeo
tools.shortDesc: AI-powered creative copilot for video editors to find, edit and assemble footage using natural language.
tools.fullDesc: Rodeo is TwelveLabs' first application-layer product that brings AI agents directly into video production workflows. It enables creators to describe what they want and instantly find and assemble perfect clips from their entire footage library. Designed for producers, editors, creative directors, and documentarians, Rodeo removes technical barriers and accelerates the journey from raw footage to finished stories.

info.value: <cite index="1-18,1-21">Marengo 3.0 and Pegasus 1.5 - Pegasus 1.5 achieves state-of-the-art performance in long video understanding</cite>

info.label: Context

info.label: Released
info.value: <cite index="1-7">June 1, 2026</cite>

info.label: Pricing

features: Natural language video search and moment finding across entire footage libraries
AI-powered intelligent clip suggestions and automated editing recommendations
Video assembly and sequencing with AI agents requiring no technical integration
Multimodal understanding of visual content, dialogue, and audio elements
Support for videos up to one hour long with state-of-the-art accuracy
Powered by Pegasus 1.5 and Marengo 3.0 foundation models
No-code workflow integration directly into creative tools
Instant content discovery and organization with Lifts feature
