vi.shortDesc: Trợ lý sáng tạo AI cho biên tập viên video để tìm kiếm, chỉnh sửa và ghép nối footage bằng ngôn ngữ tự nhiên.
vi.fullDesc: Rodeo là sản phẩm lớp ứng dụng đầu tiên của TwelveLabs đưa AI agents trực tiếp vào quy trình sản xuất video. Nó cho phép các nhà sáng tạo mô tả những gì họ muốn và tức thì tìm kiếm cũng như ghép nối các clip hoàn hảo từ toàn bộ thư viện footage của họ. Được thiết kế cho các nhà sản xuất, biên tập viên, giám đốc sáng tạo và những người làm phim tài liệu, Rodeo loại bỏ các rào cản kỹ thuật và tăng tốc quá trình từ footage thô đến những câu chuyện hoàn chỉnh.

zh.shortDesc: 由AI驱动的创意副驾驶工具，帮助视频编辑人员使用自然语言查找、编辑和组合素材。
zh.fullDesc: Rodeo是TwelveLabs的首款应用层产品，将AI代理直接集成到视频制作工作流程中。它使创意人员能够描述他们的需求，然后快速从整个素材库中查找和组合完美的片段。Rodeo专为制片人、编辑、创意总监和纪录片制作人设计，消除了技术障碍，加快了从原始素材到完成故事的制作过程。

tools.name: Tax AI
tools.shortDesc: Self-improving AI agent that drafts tax returns with 97% accuracy
tools.fullDesc: <cite index="1-1">OpenAI and Thrive Holdings built a self-improving tax AI using Codex that achieved 97% accuracy, cut prep time by a third, and boosted throughput 50%.</cite> <cite index="1-4">The pilot program ran through Crete Professional Alliance, a network of over 30 accounting firms, and processed 7,000 tax returns focused primarily on 1040 and 1041 filings.</cite>

info.label: Models
info.value: Tax AI built on OpenAI's Codex technology

info.label: Context
info.value: Automates 1040 and 1041 tax return preparation; 97% accuracy; saves 1/3 of preparation time; increases throughput by 50%

info.label: Released
info.value: Announced May 27, 2026 (pilot completed with 7,000 tax returns processed)

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Not publicly disclosed

features: <cite index="1-9">The system ingests direct feedback from practitioners, full production traces of prior corrections and filings, and then uses Codex to run targeted evaluations and code modifications in response to frequent issues.</cite>

<cite index="3-24,3-25,3-26">Practitioners upload source files along with any client-specific notes. Tax AI then creates a tax engine submission, ready for review. It saves practitioners about a third of their time on tax preparation, drafts returns with up to 97% accuracy, and increases throughput by about 50%.</cite>
<cite index="1-22">It targeted medium- to high-complexity returns involving messy documents and K-1 data, the kind of work that eats up the most billable hours and produces the most errors.</cite>
<cite index="3-18">One senior accountant who spent 180 hours on tax prep last year spent only 15 hours on it this year.</cite>
Self-improving loop that learns from accountant corrections and becomes more accurate over time
<cite index="12-9,12-10">At launch, only 25% of returns hit 75% correct field completion. Six weeks later, that number had climbed to 86%.</cite>
Automates 1040 and 1041 tax return preparation with document extraction and field mapping
Built on OpenAI's Codex agentic AI technology for complex reasoning and code generation

demo.desc: Tax AI processes documents, extracts data, and generates a complete tax engine submission ready for review

demo.desc: Accountants review the AI-drafted return and make corrections as needed

demo.desc: Each correction becomes a training signal that improves the system for future returns

prompts.label: Data Validation
prompts.text: Cross-reference extracted financial data with prior-year returns and applicable tax rules to identify inconsistencies or missing information before submission.

pricing.note: <cite index="1-12">OpenAI acquired an equity stake in Thrive Holdings back in December 2025, and their engineers collaborated for six months to build the system.</cite> Tax AI is deployed as an enterprise solution through Crete Professional Alliance for participating accounting firms.

vi.shortDesc: Tác nhân AI tự cải tiến soạn thảo tờ khai thuế với độ chính xác 97%
vi.fullDesc: <cite index="1-1">OpenAI và Thrive Holdings xây dựng một AI thuế tự cải tiến sử dụng Codex đạt độ chính xác 97%, giảm thời gian chuẩn bị một phần ba, và tăng thông lượng 50%.</cite> <cite index="1-4">Chương trình thí điểm chạy qua Crete Professional Alliance, một mạng lưới hơn 30 công ty kế toán, và xử lý 7.000 tờ khai thuế tập trung chủ yếu vào các hồ sơ 1040 và 1041.</cite>

tools.name: Claude Mythos
tools.priceLabel: Limited Preview / Paid Access via Project Glasswing
tools.shortDesc: Frontier AI model specialized in finding and analyzing software vulnerabilities at scale.
tools.fullDesc: Claude Mythos is a general-purpose frontier AI model developed by Anthropic that demonstrates exceptional capabilities in identifying complex software vulnerabilities. Currently available through Project Glasswing to select partner organizations, it can autonomously discover high-severity security flaws and execute multi-step exploit simulations that would typically require months of human security research.

info.label: Pricing

features: Autonomous vulnerability identification across operating systems, browsers, and applications
Multi-step exploit simulation and vulnerability chain analysis
High-severity flaw discovery with demonstrated 10x+ increase in bug-finding rates for partners
Complex cybersecurity task completion beyond individual vulnerability assessment
Cross-platform code analysis for open-source and proprietary systems
Integration with existing security infrastructure through Project Glasswing
Gated access model with strict security controls to prevent misuse
Support for defensive security operations in critical infrastructure

vi.shortDesc: Mô hình AI tiên phong chuyên môn trong việc phát hiện và phân tích các lỗ hổng phần mềm quy mô lớn.
vi.fullDesc: Claude Mythos là một mô hình AI tiên phong đa năng được phát triển bởi Anthropic, thể hiện khả năng đặc biệt trong việc xác định các lỗ hổng phần mềm phức tạp. Hiện có sẵn thông qua Project Glasswing cho các tổ chức đối tác được chọn, nó có thể tự động phát hiện các lỗ hổng bảo mật mức độ cao và thực hiện các mô phỏng khai thác đa bước mà bình thường sẽ cần hàng tháng nghiên cứu bảo mật của con người.

zh.shortDesc: 专门于大规模发现和分析软件漏洞的前沿AI模型。
zh.fullDesc: Claude Mythos是由Anthropic开发的通用前沿AI模型，在识别复杂软件漏洞方面表现出卓越的能力。目前通过Project Glasswing向选定的合作伙伴组织提供，它能够自主发现高危安全缺陷并执行多步骤漏洞利用模拟，这通常需要数月的人工安全研究。

tools.name: Recursive Superintelligence
tools.shortDesc: Self-improving AI system that autonomously enhances itself without human intervention.
tools.fullDesc: Recursive Superintelligence is a research-stage AI platform designed to automate the full AI development pipeline, enabling systems to autonomously discover knowledge and iteratively improve their own capabilities in accelerating loops. Founded by former leaders from Meta AI, Google DeepMind, OpenAI, and Salesforce, the company aims to achieve recursive self-improvement where AI systems automate parts of their own research and development. The platform targets researchers, AI development teams, and organizations seeking to leverage autonomous AI optimization for scientific discovery and complex problem-solving.

info.label: Type
info.value: Self-improving AI Research Platform

info.label: Released
info.value: May 2026 (planned launch)

info.label: Best for
info.value: Automating AI research, scientific discovery, autonomous model optimization

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Not yet available; research stage startup

features: Autonomous recursive self-improvement enabling AI systems to enhance their own capabilities without human intervention
Full AI development pipeline automation including experiment design, data selection, training, and evaluation
Open-ended knowledge discovery and research automation across multiple scientific domains
Continuous performance optimization through iterative feedback loops and self-learning processes
Scalable infrastructure supporting large-scale compute requirements for autonomous training systems
Research-grade system architecture built by elite AI researchers from DeepMind, Meta, and OpenAI
Staged roadmap approaching superintelligence through progressive capability levels
Framework for automating AI-to-AI improvement cycles and accelerating development velocity

demo.title: Iterative Knowledge Discovery

vi.shortDesc: Hệ thống AI tự cải thiện có khả năng nâng cao chính nó một cách tự động mà không cần can thiệp của con người.
vi.fullDesc: Recursive Superintelligence là một nền tảng AI giai đoạn nghiên cứu được thiết kế để tự động hóa toàn bộ quy trình phát triển AI, cho phép các hệ thống tự động khám phá kiến thức và liên tục cải thiện khả năng của chính nó thông qua các vòng lặp tăng tốc. Được thành lập bởi các lãnh đạo cũ từ Meta AI, Google DeepMind, OpenAI và Salesforce, công ty hướng tới đạt được tự cải thiện đệ quy nơi các hệ thống AI tự động hóa các phần của nghiên cứu và phát triển của chính nó. Nền tảng hướng đến các nhà nghiên cứu, các đội phát triển AI và các tổ chức muốn tận dụng tối ưu hóa AI tự động cho khám phá khoa học và giải quyết các vấn đề phức tạp.

zh.shortDesc: 一个自我改进的AI系统,能够在没有人类干预的情况下自主增强自身能力。
zh.fullDesc: Recursive Superintelligence是一个研究阶段的AI平台,旨在自动化整个AI开发流程,使系统能够自主发现知识并通过加速循环迭代改进自身能力。该公司由来自Meta AI、Google DeepMind、OpenAI和Salesforce的前任领导者创立,致力于实现递归自我改进,其中AI系统能够自动化其研究和开发的某些部分。该平台面向研究人员、AI开发团队和希望利用自主AI优化进行科学发现和解决复杂问题的组织。

tools.name: Decagon Voice
tools.shortDesc: Enterprise-grade AI voice agents for inbound and outbound customer calls with sub-second latency.
tools.fullDesc: Decagon Voice is an AI voice agent platform built for enterprise customer support, enabling businesses to handle inbound phone calls and outbound campaigns using the same intelligent Agent Operating Procedures (AOPs) that govern chat and email channels. With partnerships like ElevenLabs for hyper-realistic voices and sub-second latency performance, it delivers natural conversations while seamlessly integrating with call center infrastructure and maintaining cross-channel memory. It's designed for large enterprises managing high support volumes who need AI-powered phone support alongside other communication channels.

info.label: Models
info.value: Decagon Voice 2.0 (current version, launched September 2025 with sub-second latency, customizable tone, interruption handling, and proactive outbound calling)

info.label: Context
info.value: Enterprise AI voice agent supporting chat, email, and voice across Amazon Connect, RingCentral, and SIP trunking integrations

info.label: Released
info.value: Voice 2.0 launched September 2025; Spring 2026 update added proactive outbound agents, persistent user memory, and autonomous debugging workbench

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Custom enterprise pricing (no public rates published). Estimated starting around $95K-$250K+ annually with $50K platform fee plus usage charges. Two models: per-conversation (~$0.99) or per-resolution (~$0.50), both customized via sales

features: Inbound and outbound voice call handling with sub-second latency (65% faster with Voice 2.0)
Agent Operating Procedures (AOPs) for defining complex workflows in natural language
Cross-channel memory enabling seamless handoffs between voice, chat, email, and SMS
Brand voice customization: adjust tone, speed, style, pronunciation of company-specific terms
Warm handoff to human agents with conversation summary for smooth escalation
Outbound campaigns for appointment reminders, renewals, and proactive customer engagement
Integrations with telephony infrastructure including Amazon Connect, RingCentral, and SIP trunks
Real-time analytics and quality monitoring with Watchtower observability tools

demo.title: Inbound Voice Support
demo.desc: Customer calls and describes an issue; Decagon Voice agent understands intent, retrieves relevant knowledge, and resolves or escalates with context.

demo.title: Outbound Proactive Campaign
demo.desc: Agent initiates call to customer for appointment reminder or renewal offer; maintains conversation history and updates customer record in real-time.

demo.title: Omnichannel Continuity
demo.desc: Customer starts issue in chat, continues via voice call, receives follow-up SMS—all with preserved context and conversation history.

prompts.label: AOP Workflow Example
prompts.text: If customer reports payment failed, verify purchase date, check transaction history in database, offer re-attempt with different payment method, or escalate to billing if issue persists.

prompts.label: Voice Customization
prompts.text: Set agent tone to warm and approachable, ensure 'Decagon' and 'ACME Corp' are pronounced correctly, pause briefly before transfer to humans.

prompts.label: Escalation Trigger
prompts.text: If customer sentiment score drops below -0.6 or explicitly requests agent after 3 attempts to resolve, hand off to human with summary of conversation and customer history.

pricing.note: Decagon Voice uses custom enterprise pricing with no public rate card. Typical contracts range $50K–$580K+ annually based on call volume, channel mix (voice costs more than chat), integration complexity, and SLA requirements. Minimum annual commitment typically $50K. No free trial or self-serve signup; enterprise sales process required.

plans.name: Custom Enterprise Plan
features: Inbound and outbound voice AI agents
Dedicated onboarding and customer success manager

changes: Proactive outbound agents - agents can initiate calls for renewals, follow-ups, or outreach
Persistent user memory - agents retain context across interactions so customers do not repeat themselves
AI debugging workbench - autonomous debugging capabilities for agent refinement
Duet - AI partner managing full agent lifecycle through conversation
80% of traffic now runs on Decagon-trained in-house models (since March 2026) rather than third-party providers
Added outbound voice capabilities for proactive AI-initiated calls and campaigns
Added persistent cross-channel memory for context retention across interactions
65% reduction in generation latency for faster responses
Improved prosody in streaming generation for more natural speech rhythm and intonation
Infrastructure enhancements including cloud region optimization to reduce roundtrip times
Self-serve customization tools for brand voice control without engineering resources

vi.shortDesc: Các tác nhân giọng nói AI cấp doanh nghiệp cho cuộc gọi khách hàng đến và đi với độ trễ dưới một giây.
vi.fullDesc: Decagon Voice là nền tảng tác nhân giọng nói AI được xây dựng cho hỗ trợ khách hàng doanh nghiệp, cho phép các doanh nghiệp xử lý cuộc gọi điện thoại đến và các chiến dịch đi sử dụng cùng một Quy trình Hoạt động Tác nhân (AOPs) thông minh quản lý các kênh trò chuyện và email. Với các quan hệ đối tác như ElevenLabs cho các giọng nói siêu chân thực và hiệu suất độ trễ dưới một giây, nó cung cấp các cuộc hội thoại tự nhiên trong khi tích hợp liền mạch với cơ sở hạ tầng trung tâm cuộc gọi và duy trì bộ nhớ liên kênh. Nó được thiết kế cho các doanh nghiệp lớn quản lý khối lượng hỗ trợ cao cần hỗ trợ điện thoại do AI cung cấp cùng với các kênh liên lạc khác.

zh.shortDesc: 企业级AI语音智能体，用于入站和出站客户通话，延迟低于一秒。
zh.fullDesc: Decagon Voice是为企业客户支持构建的AI语音智能体平台，使企业能够使用相同的智能代理运营程序（AOPs）处理入站电话和出站活动，这些程序同样管理聊天和电子邮件渠道。通过与ElevenLabs的合作实现超逼真语音和亚秒级延迟性能，它提供自然流畅的对话体验，同时与呼叫中心基础设施无缝集成并维护跨渠道记忆。该平台专为管理大量支持业务量的大型企业设计，使其能够在提供AI驱动的电话支持的同时整合其他通信渠道。

tools.name: Thinking Machines Lab
tools.shortDesc: Managed API platform for fine-tuning and training open-source AI models with distributed infrastructure.
tools.fullDesc: Thinking Machines Lab's Tinker is a training API platform that provides researchers, developers, and enterprises with managed infrastructure for fine-tuning and customizing open-source AI models. It abstracts away the complexity of distributed training, resource management, and compute orchestration while offering low-level control over the training process. Designed for AI researchers, academic institutions, and developers who need to adapt frontier models to specific use cases.

info.label: Type
info.value: ML Training Platform / API

info.label: Released
info.value: October 2025

info.label: Best for
info.value: Researchers, developers, enterprises fine-tuning open-source models

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free during beta, usage-based pricing by tokens

features: Managed distributed training infrastructure for open-source model fine-tuning
Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) for efficient parameter updates
Support for supervised learning and reinforcement learning workflows
Integration with Meta Llama and Alibaba Qwen models
Automatic handling of scheduling, resource management, and failure recovery
Tinker Cookbook with pre-built post-training templates
Custom model download for deployment on user hardware
On-policy distillation enabling 9-30x compute efficiency improvements

demo.title: Setup Tinker API Access
demo.desc: Initialize your Tinker API connection with your credentials and select the base model to fine-tune.
demo.code:
from tinker import TinkerClient
client = TinkerClient(api_key='your_key')
model = client.init_model('llama-7b')

demo.title: Configure Training Loop
demo.desc: Define your training process using simple functions for forward pass, backward pass, and optimization steps.
demo.code:
loss = model.forward(batch)
loss.backward()
optimizer.step()

demo.title: Execute Custom Fine-tuning
demo.desc: Run your fine-tuning experiment with your data on Tinker's managed GPU clusters.
demo.code:
results = client.train(
  model_id='llama-7b',
  training_script='train.py',
  num_gpus=4
)

demo.title: Download Trained Model
demo.desc: Download the fine-tuned model for deployment on your own infrastructure.
demo.code: trained_model = client.download_model('job_id')

pricing.note: Tinker launched in private beta with free access. Usage-based pricing (per million tokens) is being introduced for public availability. Pricing reflects compute usage, with mixture-of-experts models offering better cost-effectiveness than dense models.

plans.name: Beta Free Tier
features: Free trial period for approved researchers

vi.shortDesc: Nền tảng API được quản lý để tinh chỉnh và huấn luyện các mô hình AI mã nguồn mở với cơ sở hạ tầng phân tán.
vi.fullDesc: Tinker của Thinking Machines Lab là nền tảng API huấn luyện cung cấp cho các nhà nghiên cứu, nhà phát triển và doanh nghiệp cơ sở hạ tầng được quản lý để tinh chỉnh và tùy chỉnh các mô hình AI mã nguồn mở. Nó che giấu độ phức tạp của huấn luyện phân tán, quản lý tài nguyên và điều phối tính toán trong khi cung cấp kiểm soát mức thấp đối với quy trình huấn luyện. Được thiết kế cho các nhà nghiên cứu AI, các tổ chức học tập và các nhà phát triển cần điều chỉnh các mô hình tiên tiến cho các trường hợp sử dụng cụ thể.

zh.shortDesc: 用于微调和训练开源AI模型的托管API平台，配备分布式基础设施。
zh.fullDesc: Thinking Machines Lab的Tinker是一个训练API平台，为研究人员、开发者和企业提供托管基础设施，用于微调和定制开源AI模型。它隐藏了分布式训练、资源管理和计算编排的复杂性，同时提供对训练过程的低级控制。该平台专为需要将前沿模型适配到特定��例的AI研究人员、学术机构和开发者设计。

tools.name: Itential FlowAI
tools.shortDesc: Agentic orchestration layer for infrastructure operations with governed AI reasoning and deterministic execution.
tools.fullDesc: Itential FlowAI is an agentic framework that enables enterprises to build, deploy, and govern AI agents that reason through infrastructure challenges and execute actions safely within policy-enforced workflows. It separates intelligent reasoning from deterministic execution, ensuring every agent action passes through governance controls, RBAC, and audit logging. Designed for infrastructure teams managing hybrid environments, FlowAI combines LLM capabilities with Itential's trusted automation platform to deliver autonomous operations without compromising security or compliance.

info.label: Models
info.value: FlowAI is an agentic framework (not a traditional LLM model). It includes: FlowAgents (task-oriented reasoning agents), FlowAgent Builder (interface for creating role-based agents), FlowMCP Gateway (governance extension for external agents), and FlowMCP Server (enterprise-grade MCP management).

info.label: Context
info.value: FlowAI is an agentic orchestration platform for infrastructure operations that combines AI reasoning with deterministic, policy-governed execution. It enables enterprises to build, deploy, and run AI agents on infrastructure with enterprise governance, security, and operational controls.

info.label: Released
info.value: Generally available as of July 1, 2026. Previously in Private Customer Preview starting November 2025. Validated through 6-month FlowAI Innovation Program across telecom, financial services, and utilities.

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Pricing information is not publicly disclosed on Itential's website. Contact Itential directly for pricing details, as it is an enterprise platform with custom pricing models.

features: FlowAgent Builder for creating and governing role-based AI agents with defined reasoning styles and tool access
FlowAgents that reason through operational goals and execute safely through deterministic workflows with full auditability
FlowMCP Gateway that securely invokes external infrastructure agents and Model Context Protocol tools like NetBox and Selector
Integration with external LLMs (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini) via Itential MCP Server for agent connectivity
Support for existing automation tools including Ansible, Terraform, Python scripts, and 300+ pre-built integrations
Granular RBAC and approval gates ensuring agents operate within defined autonomy thresholds
Pre/post validation, audit logging, and rollback capabilities for every infrastructure change
ReAct reasoning loop enabling agents to observe state, reason, select tools, and act iteratively

demo.code: https://www.itential.com/resource/demo/building-and-running-your-first-flowagent-in-the-itential-platform-with-flowai/

demo.title: Agent Framework Architecture
demo.desc: Overview of FlowAI's separation between intelligent reasoning layer and deterministic execution engine
demo.code: Agent reasoning → FlowMCP validation → Platform execution → Audit trail

prompts.label: Agent Design
prompts.text: Create a network remediation agent that can detect configuration drift across hybrid infrastructure, reason through compliance implications, and execute corrective workflows with pre/post validation.

prompts.label: Multi-Step Orchestration
prompts.text: Build a cloud provisioning agent that interprets infrastructure intent, coordinates AWS VPC setup with IPAM subnet allocation, and notifies teams via Slack—all within role-based access controls.

prompts.label: Governance Enforcement
prompts.text: Design an agent that can propose multi-step infrastructure changes but requires human approval for operations exceeding specified blast-radius thresholds before deterministic execution.

pricing.note: Itential FlowAI is included in Itential Platform enterprise licensing, which is node-based and requires contacting sales. Pricing scales with infrastructure complexity and automation scope.

plans.name: Enterprise Platform
features: FlowMCP gateway for external agent integration
Itential Automation Gateway for on-premises execution

changes: FlowAI reached general availability on July 1, 2026 at Cisco Live US 2026
Three-layer architecture implemented: Agentic Reasoning, Deterministic Execution, and Integration & Connectivity
FlowMCP Gateway and FlowMCP Server enterprise capabilities launched for governing external agents and MCP tools
Six-month validation program completed across major enterprises including Lumen, involving incident triage, fault remediation, and firewall policy automation use cases
451 Research validation report released positioning FlowAI as foundation for autonomous, governed infrastructure operations

vi.shortDesc: Lớp điều phối agentic cho các hoạt động cơ sở hạ tầng với suy luận AI được quản trị và thực thi xác định.
vi.fullDesc: Itential FlowAI là một framework agentic cho phép các doanh nghiệp xây dựng, triển khai và quản trị các AI agent có khả năng suy luận qua các thách thức cơ sở hạ tầng và thực thi các hành động một cách an toàn trong các quy trình công việc được thực thi chính sách. Nó tách biệt suy luận thông minh khỏi thực thi xác định, đảm bảo mọi hành động của agent đều trải qua các điều khiển quản trị, RBAC và ghi nhật ký kiểm toán. Được thiết kế cho các nhóm cơ sở hạ tầng quản lý các môi trường kết hợp, FlowAI kết hợp các khả năng LLM với nền tảng tự động hóa đáng tin cậy của Itential để cung cấp các hoạt động tự chủ mà không ảnh hưởng đến bảo mật hoặc tuân thủ.

zh.shortDesc: 用于基础设施运营的代理编排层，具有受控AI推理和确定性执行。
zh.fullDesc: Itential FlowAI是一个代理框架，使企业能够构建、部署和管理AI代理，这些代理能够通过基础设施挑战进行推理，并在策略强制工作流中安全地执行操作。它将智能推理与确定性执行分离，确保每个代理操作都通过治理控制、RBAC和审计日志。FlowAI专为管理混合环境的基础设施团队设计，将LLM功能与Itential信任的自动化平台相结合，在不影响安全性或合规性的前提下提供自主运维能力。

tools.name: NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety
tools.shortDesc: Compact multimodal content safety model with custom policy support and auditable reasoning.
tools.fullDesc: NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety is a 4B-parameter multimodal content moderation model that evaluates text and image inputs alongside optional responses. It supports 12 languages, 128K context window, and enables custom enterprise policy enforcement with optional reasoning traces. Designed for LLM/VLM safety pipelines, it unifies multimodal capabilities with reasoning and domain-specific policy adaptation.

info.label: Type
info.value: Small Language Model (SLM) - Safety

info.label: Released
info.value: June 2026

info.label: Best for
info.value: Content moderation, safety pipelines, enterprise AI guardrails

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Open source - Free to use and self-host

features: Multimodal moderation for text and image inputs in single inference call
128K token context window for comprehensive safety assessment
12-language support including English, Spanish, Mandarin, German, French, Hindi, Japanese, Arabic, Thai, Dutch, Italian, and Korean
23 safety categories based on Aegis v2 taxonomy for detailed classification
Custom policy support enabling domain-specific content rules at inference time
Auditable reasoning traces explaining safety verdicts with step-by-step rationale
4B parameters fine-tuned from Google's Gemma-3-4B-it for efficient deployment
Open weights under NVIDIA Open Model License for commercial use and customization

from transformers import Gemma3ForConditionalGeneration
model = Gemma3ForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained('nvidia/Nemotron-3.5-Content-Safety')

vi.shortDesc: Mô hình kiểm duyệt nội dung đa phương tiện nhỏ gọn với hỗ trợ chính sách tùy chỉnh và lý luận có thể kiểm toán.
vi.fullDesc: NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety là một mô hình kiểm duyệt nội dung đa phương tiện với 4 tỷ tham số, đánh giá đầu vào văn bản và hình ảnh cùng với các phản hồi tùy chọn. Nó hỗ trợ 12 ngôn ngữ, cửa sổ ngữ cảnh 128K và cho phép thực thi chính sách doanh nghiệp tùy chỉnh với các vết lý luận tùy chọn. Được thiết kế cho các đường ống an toàn LLM/VLM, nó kết hợp các khả năng đa phương tiện với lý luận và thích ứng chính sách theo lĩnh vực.

zh.shortDesc: 紧凑的多模态内容安全模型，支持自定义策略和可审计推理。
zh.fullDesc: NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety是一个40亿参数的多模态内容审核模型，可评估文本和图像输入以及可选的响应。它支持12种语言、128K上下文窗口，并支持可选推理跟踪的自定义企业策略执行。该模型专为LLM/VLM安全管道设计，将多模态功能与推理和特定领域策略适配统一在一起。

tools.name: OpenCode
tools.shortDesc: Open source AI coding agent for terminal, IDE, and desktop with 75+ LLM provider support.
tools.fullDesc: OpenCode is a powerful terminal-based AI coding agent that helps developers write, refactor, debug, and understand code with support for multiple AI providers. Built with open-source principles and used by over 7.5M developers monthly, it enables developers to choose from 75+ LLM providers, maintain data privacy, and run models locally through integrations like Ollama.

info.label: Models
info.value: 75+ providers including Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, Qwen, xAI/Grok, local models via Ollama, GitHub Copilot

info.label: Context
info.value: Varies by model provider. Model registry via models.dev

info.label: Released
info.value: June 2025 (v1.17.9 as of June 2026)

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free (core tool with own API keys). OpenCode Go: $5 first month, then $10/month (open-source models). OpenCode Zen: Pay-as-you-go at provider rates plus 4.4% + $0.30. OpenCode Black: $200/month (premium models)

features: Support for 75+ AI model providers including OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, AWS Bedrock, Groq, Azure, and local models via Ollama
Terminal user interface built with Bubble Tea for smooth interaction directly in your command line
Session management to save and manage multiple conversation threads with persistent SQLite storage
Tool integration enabling AI to execute commands, search files, modify code, and track changes in real-time
Language Server Protocol (LSP) integration for context-aware code intelligence and diagnostics
Multiple built-in agents: Build agent for full development access and Plan agent for read-only analysis
GitHub integration to triage issues, implement features, and submit pull requests directly from comments
Model Context Protocol (MCP) support for extending capabilities through external tools and services

vi.shortDesc: Công cụ lập trình AI mã nguồn mở cho terminal, IDE và desktop với hỗ trợ 75+ nhà cung cấp LLM.
vi.fullDesc: OpenCode là một công cụ lập trình AI mạnh mẽ dựa trên terminal giúp các lập trình viên viết, tái cấu trúc, gỡ lỗi và hiểu code với hỗ trợ cho nhiều nhà cung cấp AI. Được xây dựng theo nguyên tắc mã nguồn mở và được sử dụng bởi hơn 7,5 triệu lập trình viên mỗi tháng, nó cho phép các lập trình viên chọn từ 75+ nhà cung cấp LLM, duy trì bảo mật dữ liệu và chạy các mô hình cục bộ thông qua các tích hợp như Ollama.

zh.shortDesc: 面向终端、IDE 和桌面的开源 AI 编码代理,支持 75+ 个 LLM 提供商。
zh.fullDesc: OpenCode 是一个强大的基于终端的 AI 编码代理,帮助开发者编写、重构、调试和理解代码,支持多个 AI 提供商。OpenCode 采用开源原则构建,每月有 750 万以上开发者使用,使开发者能够从 75+ 个 LLM 提供商中选择、维护数据隐私,并通过 Ollama 等集成在本地运行模型。

tools.name: AWS Agentic Shopping Assistant
tools.shortDesc: Enterprise AI shopping assistant platform for retailers to deploy conversational commerce experiences.
tools.fullDesc: The AWS Agentic Shopping Assistant enables retailers and e-commerce brands to build intelligent, conversational shopping assistants powered by the same technology that drives Amazon's Alexa for Shopping. Built on AWS services including Amazon Bedrock AgentCore and OpenSearch, it provides retailers with architecture guidance, starter code, and professional services to deploy AI-powered shopping experiences in approximately 60 days rather than years.

info.label: Models
info.value: <cite index="2-1">Built on Anthropic's Haiku 4.5 model with Amazon Bedrock providing observability, authentication, and evaluations</cite>

info.label: Context
info.value: <cite index="14-13,14-20">Built on three AWS services — Amazon Bedrock (foundation-model access), Amazon Bedrock AgentCore (agent orchestration), and Amazon OpenSearch (product retrieval)</cite>

info.label: Released
info.value: <cite index="3-4">The Agentic Shopping Assistant was announced May 27, 2026</cite>

info.label: Pricing
info.value: <cite index="3-5">Pricing for the packaged ASA is custom "private offer" only; there is no public list price, and retailers must contact an AWS account representative</cite>

features: Multi-turn conversational interface with persistent session context for natural shopping discussions
Semantic product catalog retrieval using Amazon Bedrock Embeddings for intent-based recommendations
Natural language understanding enabling personalized product discovery and recommendations
Brand voice and catalog customization with AWS Generative AI Innovation Center support
Multi-layer content guardrails and safety features to prevent irrelevant or harmful outputs
Conversation analytics and automated evaluation frameworks for continuous quality improvement
Cross-session memory and customer profile awareness for personalized shopping experiences
Rich visual product cards with images, pricing, and specifications for intuitive browsing

demo.title: Customer Discovery
demo.desc: Shopper describes what they're looking for in natural conversation
demo.code: Customer: 'I'm looking for a professional gift for someone who loves gadgets, budget around $200'

demo.title: Contextual Understanding
demo.desc: Assistant builds understanding through multi-turn dialogue and asks clarifying questions
demo.code: Assistant: 'What type of gadgets interest them? Tech accessories, smart home devices, or portable electronics?'

demo.title: Personalized Recommendations
demo.desc: Assistant retrieves and ranks relevant products from live catalog with visual cards
demo.code: Assistant displays: Product image, price, specifications, customer reviews, and availability

demo.title: Guided Purchase
demo.desc: Guide customer through comparison and selection to purchase decision
demo.code: Customer: 'Tell me more about the wireless earbuds option' | Assistant compares features and pricing

prompts.text: I'm looking for a professional outfit for job interviews. I prefer navy or gray colors, medium budget, and need something for a corporate law firm environment.

prompts.label: Personalized Discovery

pricing.note: AWS Agentic Shopping Assistant uses custom enterprise pricing based on deployment requirements, catalog size, transaction volume, and professional services engagement. Retailers work with AWS Account Representatives for custom quotes through flexible engagement models (AWS-built, advisory-led, or partner-supported).

plans.name: AWS-Built
features: Full end-to-end deployment by AWS team

plans.name: Advisory-Led
features: Retailer builds with AWS advisory support
Reduced engagement costs vs. full AWS build

plans.name: Partner-Supported
features: AWS system integrator partner handles implementation
Access to AWS Generative AI Innovation Center

vi.shortDesc: Nền tảng trợ lý mua sắm AI doanh nghiệp cho nhà bán lẻ triển khai trải nghiệm thương mại hội thoại.
vi.fullDesc: AWS Agentic Shopping Assistant cho phép các nhà bán lẻ và thương hiệu thương mại điện tử xây dựng các trợ lý mua sắm thông minh, hội thoại được hỗ trợ bởi công nghệ tương tự như Amazon Alexa for Shopping. Được xây dựng trên các dịch vụ AWS bao gồm Amazon Bedrock AgentCore và OpenSearch, nó cung cấp cho nhà bán lẻ hướng dẫn kiến trúc, mã khởi động và dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp để triển khai trải nghiệm mua sắm được hỗ trợ bởi AI trong khoảng 60 ngày thay vì nhiều năm.

zh.shortDesc: 企业级AI购物助手平台，供零售商部署对话式商务体验。
zh.fullDesc: AWS Agentic Shopping Assistant使零售商和电子商务品牌能够构建由驱动Amazon Alexa for Shopping的同样技术支持的智能对话式购物助手。基于AWS服务（包括Amazon Bedrock AgentCore和OpenSearch），它为零售商提供架构指导、初始代码和专业服务，使其能在约60天而非数年内部署AI支持的购物体验。

tools.name: Sakana Fugu
tools.shortDesc: Multi-agent orchestration system routing tasks across frontier LLMs via single API.
tools.fullDesc: Sakana Fugu is a learned multi-agent orchestration system that routes tasks across a pool of frontier language models behind a single OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Rather than relying on a monolithic model, it dynamically selects which specialized agents to use, delegates subtasks, verifies results, and synthesizes final answers. Ideal for developers and enterprises seeking frontier-level reasoning with vendor diversity and protection against single-model dependency.

info.label: Models
info.value: Fugu (fugu) and Fugu Ultra (fugu-ultra-20260615)

info.label: Context
info.value: 1M tokens

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Subscriptions: Standard $20/mo, Pro $100/mo, Max $200/mo. Pay-as-you-go: Fugu Ultra $5 per 1M input tokens, $30 per 1M output tokens, $0.50 cached input. Higher rates ($10/$45/$1.00) for contexts above 272K tokens. Launch offer: free second month if subscribed by July 31, 2026.

features: Learned routing that automatically decides which models to delegate to based on task requirements.
1M token context window supporting long documents and large codebases.
OpenAI-compatible API for seamless integration with existing tools and workflows.
Per-request cost and usage reporting for real-time spend visibility.
Tool use, function calling, and vision input support in single unified model.
Automatic failover: if one model becomes unavailable, Fugu routes around it.
Dual model variants: Fugu for latency-sensitive work and Fugu Ultra for complex reasoning.
No fee stacking: pay only the highest-tier model rate when multiple agents are active.

demo.title: Initialize OpenAI-compatible client
demo.desc: Configure your existing OpenAI client to point to Sakana Fugu console.
demo.code:
from openai import OpenAI
client = OpenAI(api_key='YOUR_SAKANA_KEY', base_url='https://api.sakana.ai/v1')

demo.title: Send request to Fugu
demo.desc: Use standard chat completion format; Fugu handles agent orchestration internally.
demo.code:
response = client.chat.completions.create(
  model='fugu-ultra-20260615',
  messages=[{'role': 'user', 'content': 'Review this code for bugs'}]
)
print(response.choices[0].message.content)

demo.title: Monitor per-request costs
demo.desc: Every response includes detailed token usage and cost breakdown for that request.
demo.code:
print(f"Input: {response.usage.input_tokens}")
print(f"Output: {response.usage.output_tokens}")
print(f"Cost: ${response.usage.cost}")

vi.shortDesc: Hệ thống điều phối đa tác nhân định tuyến các tác vụ qua các LLM tiên tiến thông qua một API duy nhất.
vi.fullDesc: Sakana Fugu là một hệ thống điều phối đa tác nhân được học tập, định tuyến các tác vụ qua một nhóm các mô hình ngôn ngữ tiên tiến phía sau một điểm cuối tương thích OpenAI. Thay vì dựa vào một mô hình đơn khối, nó động lựa chọn những tác nhân chuyên biệt nào sử dụng, ủy quyền các tác vụ con, xác minh kết quả và tổng hợp các câu trả lời cuối cùng. Lý tưởng cho các nhà phát triển và doanh nghiệp tìm kiếm suy luận mức tiên tiến với đa dạng nhà cung cấp và bảo vệ chống lại phụ thuộc vào một mô hình duy nhất.

zh.shortDesc: 多智能体编排系统，通过单一 API 在前沿语言模型之间路由任务。
zh.fullDesc: Sakana Fugu 是一个学习型多智能体编排系统，在单个 OpenAI 兼容端点后面的前沿语言模型池之间路由任务。它不依赖于单一的单体模型，而是动态选择要使用的专门代理、委派子任务、验证结果并合成最终答案。非常适合寻求前沿级推理、供应商多样性和防止单一模型���赖的开发者和企业。

tools.name: SuperIntern
tools.shortDesc: AI-powered assistant that automates meetings, email, scheduling, and group chat management.
tools.fullDesc: SuperIntern is an always-on AI assistant that embeds intelligence directly into your workflows across meetings, email, messaging platforms, and browser tasks. It provides real-time meeting transcription, live note-taking, community management, and automated task execution without requiring bots to join your calls. Designed for teams, founders, and communities seeking to eliminate operational busywork.

Nó cung cấp chuyên ghi cuộc họp thời gian thực, ghi chú trực tiếp, quản lý cộng đồng và thực thi tác vụ tự động mà không cần bot tham gia cuộc gọi của bạn. Được thiết kế cho các đội, nhà sáng lập và cộng đồng muốn loại bỏ công việc vận hành thường ngày.

vi.fullDesc: Claude Science là một bàn làm việc AI gộp các công cụ nghiên cứu rời rạc thành một môi trường duy nhất cho các nhà khoa học. Nó cung cấp quyền truy cập vào hơn 60 cơ sở dữ liệu khoa học, cho phép phân tích dựa trên mã lệnh với khả năng kiểm toán đầy đủ, và giúp các nhà nghiên cứu tiến hành từ đánh giá tài liệu đến xuất bản bản thảo. Tối ưu cho sinh học tính toán, khám phá dược phẩm, bộ gen học, và bất kỳ quy trình nào yêu cầu phân tích có thể tái tạo, đa bước.

zh.fullDesc: Claude Science是一个AI工作台，将分散的研究工具整合到单一环境中供科学家使用。它提供60多个科学数据库的访问权限，支持代码驱动的分析并具有完整的审计能力，帮助研究人员从文献综述到手稿发表的整个过程。适用于计算生物学、药物发现、基因组学以及任何需要可重复、多步骤分析的工作流。

tools.name: Brain2Qwerty v2
tools.shortDesc: Non-invasive AI system decoding typed sentences from MEG brain recordings at 61% word accuracy.
tools.fullDesc: Brain2Qwerty v2 decodes natural sentences from magnetoencephalography (MEG) brain recordings using deep learning without requiring surgical implants. It combines character, word, and sentence-level neural modules to achieve 61% average word accuracy—significantly outperforming prior non-invasive methods. Designed for neuroscience researchers and AI engineers exploring biosignal decoding and assistive communication technologies.

info.label: Type
info.value: Brain-to-text decoder using non-invasive MEG

info.label: Released
info.value: June 2026

info.label: Best for
info.value: Neuroscience research, assistive communication technology development

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Free open-source code under CC BY-NC 4.0 license

features: Real-time sentence decoding from continuous MEG brain recordings without keystroke timing requirements
Three-level hierarchical architecture processing character, word, and sentence-level information
End-to-end deep learning with convolutional encoder and transformer eliminating hand-crafted event detection
Fine-tuned large language model integration for semantic context and error correction
61% average word accuracy across participants, up to 78% for best participant
Trained on approximately 22,000 sentences from nine volunteers with 10 hours per participant
Autonomous AI agents for pipeline optimization during model development
Full training code released open-source for reproducible research

demo.title: Setup
demo.desc: Participant wears MEG sensor cap in magnetically shielded room while actively typing sentences

demo.title: Recording
demo.desc: MEG device captures magnetic fields from brain activity at high temporal resolution during typing

demo.title: Processing
demo.desc: Convolutional encoder extracts character-level features from raw MEG signals

demo.title: Decoding
demo.desc: Transformer models longer-range structure; language model generates coherent sentence from decoded tokens

tools.name: Dependency Firewall
tools.shortDesc: AI-powered security system that blocks malicious open-source packages before installation.
tools.fullDesc: Dependency Firewall reviews every open-source package being downloaded in an organization and blocks malicious ones before they reach developers or systems. Using depthfirst's agentic defense platform, it analyzes packages at publish time rather than install time, performing proprietary code analysis, runtime behavior detection, and intent reasoning. Built for enterprises managing AI-era security risks across developers, CI systems, and AI agents.

info.label: Released
info.value: June 2026

info.label: Best for

info.label: Pricing
info.value: Enterprise pricing; contact for details

features: Real-time analysis of packages at publication moment before installation requests
Proprietary code and install script analysis on every new package version
Runtime behavior detection to identify malicious package activity
Programmable enforcement policies for package age, dependency trees, and licenses
Evidence-backed verdicts that audit decisions to underlying signals
Integration with existing artifact repositories or standalone registry mode
Transparent override system with automatic logging of all decisions
Support for AI agents, developers, and CI systems without changing workflows

tools.name: Daytona
tools.shortDesc: Secure sandbox infrastructure for running AI-generated code with sub-90ms provisioning.
tools.fullDesc: Daytona provides secure, elastic sandbox infrastructure designed for AI agents to execute code safely in isolated environments. The platform enables rapid sandbox creation (under 90 milliseconds), stateful operations with environment snapshots, and programmatic control through SDKs and APIs. Built for teams shipping production-grade AI agent workflows, coding assistants, and developer tools that need reliable code execution without affecting existing infrastructure.

info.label: Type
info.value: Sandbox Runtime Infrastructure

info.label: Best for
info.value: AI agents, code execution, agent workflows

info.label: Pricing
info.value: $200 free credits, then usage-based per vCPU/memory/storage

features: Sub-90ms isolated sandbox provisioning with complete runtime isolation and separate kernels
Stateful environment snapshots enabling persistent agent operations and state restoration across sessions
Multi-language SDK support (Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, Java, Ruby) with REST API and CLI
Composable sandboxes with full CRUD operations, file systems, Git integration, and process execution
Massive parallelization for concurrent AI workflows and production-scale agent deployments
Computer-use virtual desktops (Linux, Windows, macOS) with full programmatic access for automation
Multi-region deployment across US, EU, and Asia with low-latency execution for global agents
Docker/OCI compatibility with support for custom base images, packages, and toolchain configuration

demo.title: Create a Sandbox
demo.desc: Spin up an isolated sandbox environment in under 90 milliseconds
demo.code:
from daytona import Daytona

config = DaytonaConfig(api_key='YOUR_API_KEY')
client = Daytona(config)
sandbox = client.create()

demo.title: Execute Code
demo.desc: Run AI-generated code safely in the isolated sandbox
demo.code:
response = sandbox.process.execute_command('python analyze.py')
print(response.result)

demo.title: Save State with Snapshot
demo.desc: Create environment snapshots for persistent agent workflows
demo.code:
snapshot = sandbox.snapshot.create(name='checkpoint_1')
sandbox.snapshot.restore(snapshot_id=snapshot.id)
